name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Good and Bad News on Walz' Emergency Powers
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **I have some good news! The Never Again Bill is gaining momentum. Senator Andrew Lang just signed onto it in the Minnesota Senate.** As you probably know, Liberty Champion Erik Mortensen wrote the [Never Again Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=2) a month ago to protect Minnesota from Governor Walz and future Governors. It eliminates a Governor from unilaterally declaring an emergency; makes his orders not lawful; AND contains a Bill of Rights for Emergencies so you can still run your business. A couple weeks ago, Senator Mark Koran carried the Senate version of the Never Again Bill. So it's great to see another Senator, jump on board. Thank you [**Senator Andrew Lang**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=UdUBanIu4fbXqYu4bSwW_eYo8iVfNQjFsUbqM2vjwm-Ojkn81yTCv7Yg2rFomxNXHPPaPOFxBtzw8rbpNYXFfg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=3)! **Unfortunately, that's where the good news ends...** We broke the news on Sunday that Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is "dancing with the Democrats". The radical left wants immediate action on police reform legislation and Gazelka is bending to their will. But when you and I ask him to do the MOST IMPORTANT thing - refuse to fund Governor Walz' budget unless his Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed - Gazelka won't pledge to you to do the right thing! **If Walz keeps his Emergency Powers and Gazelka cowers on the budget, we very likely could be facing Vaccine Passports and Permanent Mask Mandates in Minnesota. THIS IS SERIOUS BUSINESS!** If Gazelka isn't listening to us now, then it's time we ramp up our voice so he can NO LONGER IGNORE US! Our team just gave us approval to launch 55,000 calls in the next two weeks! It's time to light up Gazelka and these Senators' phone lines! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?__cf_chl_jschl_tk__=29e16e201633d89c2c22ae6098f36d1911b77f82-1619118465-0-AezIfZraHtieeevCFLvuF5E9lgiyVP1QzT8t83rIVBYsgVU098G3uGsSM7HStiDF1jgk9jxKxJwB0y4KrmVpst9bstA-BorxZlWW8nupG8gsUxfCfLgw5nXnr_mW6Vpd4oqPz-EkosWxqxoKBG198lAPd8J27tBQcdx6xNOiSARIaqSt7CLkS012yfO-x1bD3AizzmUM6GFfQ9emWnP-PrSlBt426d4CdO-1-yxzNifIAvMvdOrm7fNyM-UyOkIgXF6FoJEfSuj-rbXV59__IzhVRfn5MCdGFaIyYomxwvhxjxY3fQ9ZC6nFkgcF4hJdNLkh7qa3KAqPz7_qEviPp6fxYCGB08L37AFUoy6nWBWdMntHUZQkoSUybuX-JrKSyxN9CHp2yyru9ib3KN3Qb9A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=4 "DONATE TO THE 55,000 CALL CAMPAIGN") [DONATE TO THE 55,000 CALL CAMPAIGN](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?__cf_chl_jschl_tk__=29e16e201633d89c2c22ae6098f36d1911b77f82-1619118465-0-AezIfZraHtieeevCFLvuF5E9lgiyVP1QzT8t83rIVBYsgVU098G3uGsSM7HStiDF1jgk9jxKxJwB0y4KrmVpst9bstA-BorxZlWW8nupG8gsUxfCfLgw5nXnr_mW6Vpd4oqPz-EkosWxqxoKBG198lAPd8J27tBQcdx6xNOiSARIaqSt7CLkS012yfO-x1bD3AizzmUM6GFfQ9emWnP-PrSlBt426d4CdO-1-yxzNifIAvMvdOrm7fNyM-UyOkIgXF6FoJEfSuj-rbXV59__IzhVRfn5MCdGFaIyYomxwvhxjxY3fQ9ZC6nFkgcF4hJdNLkh7qa3KAqPz7_qEviPp6fxYCGB08L37AFUoy6nWBWdMntHUZQkoSUybuX-JrKSyxN9CHp2yyru9ib3KN3Qb9A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=5)
---
**While we are busy lighting up Gazelka's phone line, we haven't forgot about the Con Artist Democrats like Sandstede, Lislegard and Marquart.**
In fact, our field team has doorknockers in Detroit Lakes and they just knocked on 3,000 doors in the last 10 days! I can tell you first hand that Marquart's constituents are heavily on board with us in Ending Walz' Emergency Powers!
**Our team is dedicated to working around the clock for YOU! We will not rest until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed. It's too important!**
There's only three more weeks of the Legislative Session. We can't let vulnerable Democrats and spineless Republicans like Paul Gazelka make deals to fund Governor Walz' budget unless his Emergency Powers are gone for good!
But I'm afraid that's what will happen if we can't fund our doorknocking and phone banking campaigns. Too much is at stake.
[**Please help us in the final stretch with a donation of $100 today! If that's too much, $50 or $25 is extremely helpful as well. If the issue of vaccine passports and mask mandates is your TOP PRIORITY to eliminate, please consider a donation of $500!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=good_and_bad_news_on_walz&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Latinos for America First
subject: CALL TO ACTION in TEXAS for Constitutional Carry
body:
CALL TO ACTION! PLEASE go to this Senator's page https://senate.texas.gov/member.php?d=31 and click on the E-MAIL YOUR SENATOR link to the right of h
| |
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=341933.2089.1.5a43d8d22ff0cdcddcd132d001193068) |
---
****CALL TO ACTION!**** PLEASE go to this Senator's page https://senate.texas.gov/member.php?d=31 and click on the E-MAIL YOUR SENATOR link to the right of his picture and ask him to PLEASE support House Bill 1927 - House Bill 1927 would get rid of the requirement for Texas residents to get a license to carry handguns if they are not already prohibited by state or federal law from possessing a firearm. Click here to read an article about this bill: https://www.texastribune.org/2021/04/19/texas-constitutional-carry-senate/ Here is a sample letter our Legislative Affairs Director Kimberley Longoria: Dear Senator: I am a 4th Generation Texan. I am a Latina, wife, mother, teacher and small business owner. I fully support permit less carry of handguns and humbly ask for your support of House Bill 1927. Although I do have a license to carry a handgun, I strongly believe this bill simply allows Texans, Latinos, Mothers, Wives, Teachers, Small Business Owners to exercise our rights guaranteed under the Second Amendment. I have been following the crisis at the border very closely since the Obama Administration. Being so close to the border and keeping myself informed about the policies that allow the illegal immigrants to come into this country and be released into our great state of Texas only heightens the danger and is a grave risk to the safety of our communities, including especially our women and children. With the defunding of police in our communities, the response time has gotten so bad that we cannot rely on our law enforcement officers as much as we used to. Permit less carry will allow more women, Latinos and small business owners to protect not only our own lives, but the lives of our children and our communities. Criminals do not follow the laws. They do not obtain a license to carry. We need at least to be on the same playing field as these criminals who will ALWAYS have access to illegal guns and continue to carry them illegally. As a mother...as a wife...as a Latina...as a small business owner...as the Legislative Director for Latinos for America First, I BEG and I PLEAD with you to PLEASE support this bill and help protect each and every one of us. Thank you for your time. Thank you for your service. Thank you for your consideration for House Bill 1927. Latinos for America First
---
| | [ DONATE TODAY ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=341933.2090.1.96bcdec5f80b74689cb9a7e44758a00e)
---

name: Latinos for America First
subject: We are being INVADED in TEXAS. Help US SAVE AMERICA!
body:
Hello Patriots Today our National Coordinator submitted this Op-Ed to local newspapers. Please share this Op-Ed with anyone in your circle and post e
| |

[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=344167.2100.1.995c7912f8e8d98332b9d4c703993b18) |
---
Hello Patriots Today our National Coordinator submitted this Op-Ed to local newspapers. Please share this Op-Ed with anyone in your circle and post everywhere on social media AND most importantly send this letter to your ELECTED OFFICIALS. Don't forget to donate below to keep us moving forward and doing all we can to #SAVE AMERICA
---
| | [ Donate $25.00 Today ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=344167.2101.1.5ee7135effb60a9121c7ae5f87971b2d)
---
LETTER TO THE EDITOR:
Who remembers the remarks made by President Trump about the type of people that are illegally crossing our southern border? Remember how the media spun those comments misleading the American People alleging Trump had made disparaging remarks AGAINST ALL Hispanics? The narrative became that President Trump called ALL Mexicans rapists and murderers and that Mexico wasn't sending their best? That's a LIE! Customs and Border Patrol agents are reporting the capture of hundreds of actual violent criminals, gang members, sex offenders and even terrorists who are listed on watch lists. Don't believe me? Visit the Websites and social media platforms of the CBP various sectors and see for yourselves. Not every individual who illegally crosses our border is filled with good intentions and simply looking for a better life.
I've always said that Mexico is partly to blame for the Immigration problem. Because, they are the last country that these illegals must travel through to reach our southern border. Mexico is doing very little to absolutely NOTHING to stop the hundreds of thousands of illegals traveling in caravan groups across their own southern border en route to the United States. Violent Drug Cartels don't only smuggle drugs & contraband into our country. They're conducting full blown, wide scale Human Smuggling/Sex Trafficking operations. These cartels are running a modern day slavery trade, Right Underneath the Noses of the American People! All for profit. The going rate for transport collected by the cartels ranges from twenty-five hundred to nine thousand dollars per person. And these aren't just people from Mexico, Central or South America that are coming. There are people from other parts of the world like Africa, Haiti, China, Russia and the Middle East taking the treacherous and dangerous illegal migration journey.
How is this allowed to continue to happen? The current Administration and Democrats are SILENT! Why?
Some of the cartels' "cargo" includes innocent children, often unaccompanied. Women and children are sexually assaulted by their coyote handlers and criminal members in the caravan groups they travel in. Approximately sixty percent of the females (some teenagers) arriving at the processing centers are already pregnant. We know that means when they give birth, their babies receive "Anchor Baby" status and are automatically classified as American citizens. Legal immigrants waiting in line are being disenfranchised!
Our federal tax dollars and state resources are being used to process and transport thousands of illegals on a daily basis. Funding is provided to pay for bus tickets and airfare to transport illegals across our State and Nation. Where are they being taken? Seems no one in our government is equipped with that information and the answer isn't readily available to the American public. Once processed, illegals also receive cash or electronic funds cards exceeding one thousand dollars per adult. Shouldn't that type of funding be appropriated to assist American Citizens who are in need? Some of us are still trying to recover from the hardships brought on by covid. The American people waited almost a year for their stimulus relief while congress prioritized sham Impeachment circus hearings over the fate of unemployed citizens and suffering small businesses.
Yet, the illegals that are arriving daily at the processing centers receive IMMEDIATE ASSISTANCE. This isn't Fair! It's Wrong! And why do we continue to send foreign humanitarian aid to Mexico and Central American countries if they aren't helping the most needy and vulnerable of their own citizens? Instead, those very people are flocking to the United States and literally flooding across our southern border! This crisis equates to INVASION! Americans are at high risk! Law Enforcement officials and County sheriff's departments are reporting increased crime rates related to vehicle and property thefts and assaults by illegals. We've had ENOUGH press conferences and photo ops at the border by "concerned" politicians and representatives. We know what the problem is.
The real questions that need to be addressed and remain to be answered are;
Where, Who, What & When?
_Where are all the illegals being sent?
_Who is monitoring or responsible for the unaccompanied children?
_What safeguards are in place to ensure that those who are released report for their court hearings and that the influx of those who are recieving a government issued ID don't end up on our voter rolls?
_When will Washington do something to secure our borders, stop the influx of illegals coming across and FINALLY give the American people Immigration Reform Legislation that becomes The Law and is Actually Enforced? Our Elected Officials have had DECADES to solve this issue. We're tired of the empty promises and lip service. We won't settle for anything less than RESULTS!
This isn't a partisan issue or party affiliate problem. Race isn't a factor. This affects and should concern Every American. A simple internet search will provide email and phone contacts for every state and federal elected official. I'm urging every concerned citizen to contact those elected officials and demand Action in securing our borders and enforcing our nation's immigration laws! It used to be "See Something - Say Something". We've been catapulted to
"SEE SOMETHING, DO SOMETHING!
# AmericaFirst
Signed,
Latinos for America First Op-Ed written by Maria Miller National Coordinator

How is this allowed to continue to happen? The current Administration and Democrats are SILENT! Why? Some of the cartels' "cargo" includes innocent children, often unaccompanied. Women and children are sexually assaulted by their coyote handlers and criminal members in the caravan groups they travel in. Approximately sixty percent of the females (some teenagers) arriving at the processing centers are already pregnant. We know that means when they give birth, their babies receive "Anchor Baby" status and are automatically classified as American citizens. Legal immigrants waiting in line are being disenfranchised! Our federal tax dollars and state resources are being used to process and transport thousands of illegals on a daily basis. Funding is provided to pay for bus tickets and airfare to transport illegals across our State and Nation. Where are they being taken? Seems no one in our government is equipped with that information and the answer isn't readily available to the American public. Once processed, illegals also receive cash or electronic funds cards exceeding one thousand dollars per adult. Shouldn't that type of funding be appropriated to assist American Citizens who are in need? Some of us are still trying to recover from the hardships brought on by covid. The American people waited almost a year for their stimulus relief while congress prioritized sham Impeachment circus hearings over the fate of unemployed citizens and suffering small businesses. Yet, the illegals that are arriving daily at the processing centers receive IMMEDIATE ASSISTANCE. This isn't Fair! It's Wrong! And why do we continue to send foreign humanitarian aid to Mexico and Central American countries if they aren't helping the most needy and vulnerable of their own citizens? Instead, those very people are flocking to the United States and literally flooding across our southern border! This crisis equates to INVASION! Americans are at high risk! Law Enforcement officials and County sheriff's departments are reporting increased crime rates related to vehicle and property thefts and assaults by illegals. We've had ENOUGH press conferences and photo ops at the border by "concerned" politicians and representatives. We know what the problem is. The real questions that need to be addressed and remain to be answered are; Where, Who, What & When? Where are all the illegals being sent? Who is monitoring or responsible for the unaccompanied children? What safeguards are in place to ensure that those who are released report for their court hearings and that the influx of those who are recieving a government issued ID don't end up on our voter rolls? When will Washington do something to secure our borders, stop the influx of illegals coming across and FINALLY give the American people Immigration Reform Legislation that becomes The Law and is Actually Enforced? Our Elected Officials have had DECADES to solve this issue. We're tired of the empty promises and lip service. We won't settle for anything less than RESULTS! This isn't a partisan issue or party affiliate problem. Race isn't a factor. This affects and should concern Every American. A simple internet search will provide email and phone contacts for every state and federal elected official. I'm urging every concerned citizen to contact those elected officials and demand Action in securing our borders and enforcing our nation's immigration laws! It used to be "See Something - Say Something". We've been catapulted to "SEE SOMETHING, DO SOMETHING! AmericaFirst Signed, Latinos for America First Op-Ed written by Maria Miller National Coordinator "Facebook" "Instagram" "Twitter" ©2021 Latinos for Trump | 6725 Fairmont Pkwy num 102 Pasadena Tx 77505 | = "Web Version" "Preferences" "Forward" "Unsubscribe" | ?

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: Washington, DC is Not a State
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.183135.aspx)
Dear Peter,
In the last 4 months, this Administration has shown that they are only serving for their party - not all Americans. Once again, the democrats have attempted another power grab. This time they want to turn Washington, D.C. - our Nation's Capitol - into a state.
Our Constitution clearly outlines the existence of a federal district that is governed by Congress. The primary reason Democrats want to turn it into a State? To add two ultra-liberals to the Senate.
I voted NO.
Please help me in fighting to protect our Constitution and uphold the freedoms and foundations that our forefathers designed.
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_

LETTER TO THE EDITOR:
Who remembers the remarks made by President Trump about the type of people that are illegally crossing our southern border? Remember how the media spun those comments misleading the American People alleging Trump had made disparaging remarks AGAINST ALL Hispanics? The narrative became that President Trump called ALL Mexicans rapists and murderers and that Mexico wasn't sending their best? That's a LIE! Customs and Border Patrol agents are reporting the capture of hundreds of actual violent criminals, gang members, sex offenders and even terrorists who are listed on watch lists. Don't believe me? Visit the Websites and social media platforms of the CBP various sectors and see for yourselves. Not every individual who illegally crosses our border is filled with good intentions and simply looking for a better life.
I've always said that Mexico is partly to blame for the Immigration problem. Because, they are the last country that these illegals must travel through to reach our southern border. Mexico is doing very little to absolutely NOTHING to stop the hundreds of thousands of illegals traveling in caravan groups across their own southern border en route to the United States. Violent Drug Cartels don't only smuggle drugs & contraband into our country. They're conducting full blown, wide scale Human Smuggling/Sex Trafficking operations. These cartels are running a modern day slavery trade, Right Underneath the Noses of the American People! All for profit. The going rate for transport collected by the cartels ranges from twenty-five hundred to nine thousand dollars per person. And these aren't just people from Mexico, Central or South America that are coming. There are people from other parts of the world like Africa, Haiti, China, Russia and the Middle East taking the treacherous and dangerous illegal migration journey.
How is this allowed to continue to happen? The current Administration and Democrats are SILENT! Why?
Some of the cartels' "cargo" includes innocent children, often unaccompanied. Women and children are sexually assaulted by their coyote handlers and criminal members in the caravan groups they travel in. Approximately sixty percent of the females (some teenagers) arriving at the processing centers are already pregnant. We know that means when they give birth, their babies receive "Anchor Baby" status and are automatically classified as American citizens. Legal immigrants waiting in line are being disenfranchised!
Our federal tax dollars and state resources are being used to process and transport thousands of illegals on a daily basis. Funding is provided to pay for bus tickets and airfare to transport illegals across our State and Nation. Where are they being taken? Seems no one in our government is equipped with that information and the answer isn't readily available to the American public. Once processed, illegals also receive cash or electronic funds cards exceeding one thousand dollars per adult. Shouldn't that type of funding be appropriated to assist American Citizens who are in need? Some of us are still trying to recover from the hardships brought on by covid. The American people waited almost a year for their stimulus relief while congress prioritized sham Impeachment circus hearings over the fate of unemployed citizens and suffering small businesses.
Yet, the illegals that are arriving daily at the processing centers receive IMMEDIATE ASSISTANCE. This isn't Fair! It's Wrong! And why do we continue to send foreign humanitarian aid to Mexico and Central American countries if they aren't helping the most needy and vulnerable of their own citizens? Instead, those very people are flocking to the United States and literally flooding across our southern border! This crisis equates to INVASION! Americans are at high risk! Law Enforcement officials and County sheriff's departments are reporting increased crime rates related to vehicle and property thefts and assaults by illegals. We've had ENOUGH press conferences and photo ops at the border by "concerned" politicians and representatives. We know what the problem is.
The real questions that need to be addressed and remain to be answered are;
Where, Who, What & When?
_Where are all the illegals being sent?
_Who is monitoring or responsible for the unaccompanied children?
_What safeguards are in place to ensure that those who are released report for their court hearings and that the influx of those who are recieving a government issued ID don't end up on our voter rolls?
_When will Washington do something to secure our borders, stop the influx of illegals coming across and FINALLY give the American people Immigration Reform Legislation that becomes The Law and is Actually Enforced? Our Elected Officials have had DECADES to solve this issue. We're tired of the empty promises and lip service. We won't settle for anything less than RESULTS!
This isn't a partisan issue or party affiliate problem. Race isn't a factor. This affects and should concern Every American. A simple internet search will provide email and phone contacts for every state and federal elected official. I'm urging every concerned citizen to contact those elected officials and demand Action in securing our borders and enforcing our nation's immigration laws! It used to be "See Something - Say Something". We've been catapulted to
"SEE SOMETHING, DO SOMETHING!
# AmericaFirst
Signed,
Latinos for America First Op-Ed written by Maria Miller National Coordinator

body:

If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225686:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225687:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r) | |
---
Peter, the COVID hysteria has gone on far too long.

The mainstream media has elevated Dr. Fauci as an expert on Coronavirus, but the truth is, he's nothing more than a dramatic actor putting on a show for his liberal followers.

He has completely embraced theatrics and abandoned science.

Every time he makes a demand for more lockdowns, more regulation, more useless rules, his own power increases. And you lose freedom.

If you ask me, enough is enough! It's time to FIRE FAUCI. If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225688:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r)
[**ONE CLICK DONATE: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225689:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r)

**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**
Peter, if we allow Dr. Fauci to continue selling the "safety at all costs" narrative, we're never going to be a free country again.

There's no vaccine, no law, and no regulation that will satisfy a power-hungry bureaucrat like this.

While he parades around in two masks - after his vaccination - Americans are struggling. His politically motivated performance is a slap in the face to our children who need open schools, working moms and dads who need jobs, and Americans who want to get back on track.

**I'm sick of this theater. I'm sick of this whole thing. That's why I'm putting my foot down. It's time to FIRE FAUCI and if you agree I hope you'll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2252009/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225687:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r)**

I refuse to allow this chaos to become permanent, Peter.

We can't let unelected bureaucrats like Fauci destroy our economy and our very way of life.

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose him for what he is and finally FIRE FAUCI, but I can't do it alone.

**I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. Would you please chip in[$100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225692:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r), [$50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225693:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r), [$25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225687:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r), or [$10](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57225694:6SGWYFuaN:m:1:3206719985:85516AA114651DEB00D369A225631651:r) to help out? **

Together, I know you and I can stop them. And we can't give up until we do.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

The NRA plays a critical role in promoting our liberty and Second Amendment rights. They educate, train, and support legal gun owners wishing to exercise their constitutional liberties.
**[JOIN OUR FIGHT TO SAVE THE NRA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QFCXZPLX2VEhGb6iUBqHAFOLfj8zvtDtJj12sXS2l1XqBDtl-Uej7lwbpNYrQwezV69KcVri0cT49xBjgPk0LH05Eub3sk4gRWnpbvxvnxhNzdECgNz3-NAtFjJkzDbbVePR0A0DWTQ4W_O7rbmHh3S_0PfXSFluZK_2JKfIX-x2yS91ART-FC6diNRvbWdh1BNKkuVdclEAltEvkdv-QVdsmYYHnKdtjvhXuXVk26UlMp-uUGfl2E5ubhX9RIEerPh_nJKHOT0y-7C77asylnuoGa9o4zNezzIO75JbCYf55QTBSWtGIL5P2JQalhczpgrzcvRuFW8IKSMOG_Rtm5totqA08R4jt_qYIKKd7YXpqpjWQERiAIOiNFS589mQdelijyKD1JGxCRMqUSb-0tPJhm_f2F4642-qyzMqofWatsL6ab8RIRmQKIj5SCT_oluzh_1R9xvCQEjvGCtWC9JyKC33MLD1aARNZQcsRqX0qv5qe0lH7O4Bg1jf3Pbz8rSo2mob22A=&c=yBihO5PwfYUsaT9deJ1ytBWRYd0sdP5h-r0EtrtatcqcE1YTXrRZ1Q==&ch=u9YJ7ZlintcklguXMJNc_RJciCqvmTMrMzr0XjqpS26s0QzEN-OXQw==)**
Joe Biden wants to take away your Second Amendment rights, I'm fighting to save them.

This fight will happen _**inside and outside**_ the courtroom, and I want our grassroots supporters behind us as we take on the leftists up in New York.

[**Can I count on you to join me?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QFCXZPLX2VEhGb6iUBqHAFOLfj8zvtDtJj12sXS2l1XqBDtl-Uej7lwbpNYrQwezV69KcVri0cT49xBjgPk0LH05Eub3sk4gRWnpbvxvnxhNzdECgNz3-NAtFjJkzDbbVePR0A0DWTQ4W_O7rbmHh3S_0PfXSFluZK_2JKfIX-x2yS91ART-FC6diNRvbWdh1BNKkuVdclEAltEvkdv-QVdsmYYHnKdtjvhXuXVk26UlMp-uUGfl2E5ubhX9RIEerPh_nJKHOT0y-7C77asylnuoGa9o4zNezzIO75JbCYf55QTBSWtGIL5P2JQalhczpgrzcvRuFW8IKSMOG_Rtm5totqA08R4jt_qYIKKd7YXpqpjWQERiAIOiNFS589mQdelijyKD1JGxCRMqUSb-0tPJhm_f2F4642-qyzMqofWatsL6ab8RIRmQKIj5SCT_oluzh_1R9xvCQEjvGCtWC9JyKC33MLD1aARNZQcsRqX0qv5qe0lH7O4Bg1jf3Pbz8rSo2mob22A=&c=yBihO5PwfYUsaT9deJ1ytBWRYd0sdP5h-r0EtrtatcqcE1YTXrRZ1Q==&ch=u9YJ7ZlintcklguXMJNc_RJciCqvmTMrMzr0XjqpS26s0QzEN-OXQw==)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: racist trash 🚮
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
One of my Republican colleagues objected to D.C. Statehood because D.C. doesn't have its own landfill.
#

This week, I proudly voted to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state and give the 700,000+ Americans living there — most of whom are Black and brown — a say in our democracy.
D.C. Statehood is a racial justice issue, and I have had enough of Republicans’ racist insinuations that the people of Washington, D.C. are somehow unworthy of voting representation in Congress. I said as much on the House floor yesterday, and was immediately attacked for speaking truth to power.
But don’t just take my word for it. Here is a short list of some of the bad-faith arguments Republicans in Congress have given for why D.C. shouldn’t be a state:
* According to Senator Tom Cotton, because D.C. would not be a “well-rounded working-class state” like Wyoming — a state with a smaller and significantly whiter population. 🤔
* Because it isn’t large enough to qualify as a singular Congressional district...which is a complete lie, because there are actually 33 Congressional districts that are less populous than D.C. 🙄
* According to Congressman Jody Hice, because D.C. doesn’t have a landfill. (Yes, really.) With all the racist trash House Republicans have brought to this debate, it’s no wonder they’re worried about where to put it. 🚮

**There is no good faith argument for disenfranchising 700,000+ D.C. residents, who are mostly people of color.** We all know that if D.C. were a mostly white city that traditionally voted Republican, it would have been made a state a long time ago.
This movement is making a lot of people scared, because they are realizing that their white supremacist politics are no longer popular throughout the country. Together, we’ll end that kind of politics for good.
Onward,
Mondaire
Hi there — we’re facing another end-of-month deadline next week, and any potential opponent is going to look closely at our fundraising numbers to see if this movement is vulnerable.

body:
Did you see Big Tech's most recent censorship?

Friend,

Did you see Big Tech's most recent censorship?

Facebook wouldn't allow a story from the _New York Pos_ t about one of the founders of the Black Lives Matter Movement to be posted. One of the leaders of the movement, who happens to be a self-proclaimed Marxist, owns four 3.2 million dollar homes in California. We find this to be particularly interesting, don't you, Friend?

For some reason, Facebook felt that this was a story that "violated their community standards."

Why does Facebook get to decide what information the American people can or cannot know?

**This is why we should Cancel Big Tech. **

This seems to be an effective tool for them so we should just use it against them, right?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28104215/282188946/-1282350553?refcode=em210301_launch1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTdmMmY3YS01OWE0LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mM-GTuImbLe8xqETqUg1u_V4TKs3njX_cU71yyrLjD0=) Derek, As the campaign trail heats up and Early Voting is set to begin Ibraheem is racking up more and more endorsements -- showing that his campaign has the progressive, people-powered momentum behind him to help him win! Friend, Recent polling data show Gavin Newsom's approval rating taking a turn for the better in the last few weeks. After millions of Californians demanded a recall, our team needs to see for ourselves how Americans really feel. That's why we launched our official petition to gauge voter support to see how the people really feel. But, Friend, when we pulled our list, we noticed your name wasn't on it. Is this a mistake? [**If you disapprove of Gavin Newsom, this is your FINAL CHANCE to go on the record by signing your name!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jiKiZ6t0lwLXCsjz5theXdy6jhPu0dp4Pd-585Sfuq09lTH2gLBtA2OU_Aq_GNJnyT-RYDi4pueufAFEOa3YwmZXGfx6GnVhUu37PYxZIn537k1RdikGoqomMAP5IJHFxtFQsEKcEFQE-xT-QN7RqMVuow8FXLM7h0rnX4PxPKFFvpTRhNDm0LKyNK91Y1MH-64VMLbwbvkCMAsocMgf3uPJIXdeW_ow9RtF5JZmTQRfWs2d048hEMoQplgt28QInKBt5PRI9x49zPtks1_c4e8G2ccTqIMi-ZcXmuJlu-8fi0NXMimpb4aLtpUU0VBSEttLjbOAlVLSXz8cbPwrWTr6MuR-YM9NRFQe2dogS_cr2i5YBXjyBDEa1H5GH2zwNWIb2tiTuiWJI5D_MuLqjT9HDiCwDYTg-9yLXNwOvvktx3xiUwI2w7ZMMh-PsDpKlhm7CbvdCpyuingqMXeTsw==&c=68XRhjP8yXnmAu3ZMxJ0cO25qMZcISlGgZfc_q_dcvZZnFrWFgD2ZQ==&ch=iX3VrYydSWsZqochRmrrxac_hlGrgqxKUOzLhhWEvU1OUqmyHAMoUQ==) Your new deadline is midnight tonight. Date: Monday, April 19th, 2021 at 4:10 PM
Subject: Go on the record! Sign to disapprove of Newsom

Friend, we're SHOCKED. New polling data show Gavin Newsom's approval rate is on the rise. _Is this true???_ After the damage he's caused to our communities and our entire state, our team needs to see for ourselves what the people of California and other states think. Which is why we're deploying this official petition to gauge support. If you disapprove of Gavin Newsom's performance as Governor, will you go on the record and sign your name? We've set an ambitious goal to 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight. **Be one of them.[Click to sign your name here >>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jiKiZ6t0lwLXCsjz5theXdy6jhPu0dp4Pd-585Sfuq09lTH2gLBtA2OU_Aq_GNJnHutyu8Ygr7mVDsTSLoSDIAuSiZ2pRyaGVtaLNlkIKCi8pR_CfvU8CBDwG6gT1smmNGe0KbXon3qIEF9YHF7iructTWNqxNUszAMRPSJ8I0NzT0_0ccpXK6tF1RV2M64SqE77FT_3hEedJvQXxD9d67oPDztjap_yAmFdSRjsPLpB2PuMfOBVwCdo2-aw4g80o11gAST29QuC8FsVl8jTccZS9-z7gFui755xNE0qCg2Yp9NCMrD_c_-ThdST31BEmD6dIzpm0IgqGK4UcBkkZmju8D5utgN0DiIcU8vXAQtqYV3asN5KpzCtmc6MHPVB3E-PecFZXBl-kcy9ROcgq3MAcd8qSl_zlUZYwp9O1ofz4o9vUC932NWzX4IuI4H_gJtR3JZVY2JOWwVVylEGw8Y703wu7C5w&c=68XRhjP8yXnmAu3ZMxJ0cO25qMZcISlGgZfc_q_dcvZZnFrWFgD2ZQ==&ch=iX3VrYydSWsZqochRmrrxac_hlGrgqxKUOzLhhWEvU1OUqmyHAMoUQ==)** **" I DISAPPROVE OF GAVIN NEWSOM"** | [**Add Your E-Signature -> **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jiKiZ6t0lwLXCsjz5theXdy6jhPu0dp4Pd-585Sfuq09lTH2gLBtA2OU_Aq_GNJnHutyu8Ygr7mVDsTSLoSDIAuSiZ2pRyaGVtaLNlkIKCi8pR_CfvU8CBDwG6gT1smmNGe0KbXon3qIEF9YHF7iructTWNqxNUszAMRPSJ8I0NzT0_0ccpXK6tF1RV2M64SqE77FT_3hEedJvQXxD9d67oPDztjap_yAmFdSRjsPLpB2PuMfOBVwCdo2-aw4g80o11gAST29QuC8FsVl8jTccZS9-z7gFui755xNE0qCg2Yp9NCMrD_c_-ThdST31BEmD6dIzpm0IgqGK4UcBkkZmju8D5utgN0DiIcU8vXAQtqYV3asN5KpzCtmc6MHPVB3E-PecFZXBl-kcy9ROcgq3MAcd8qSl_zlUZYwp9O1ofz4o9vUC932NWzX4IuI4H_gJtR3JZVY2JOWwVVylEGw8Y703wu7C5w&c=68XRhjP8yXnmAu3ZMxJ0cO25qMZcISlGgZfc_q_dcvZZnFrWFgD2ZQ==&ch=iX3VrYydSWsZqochRmrrxac_hlGrgqxKUOzLhhWEvU1OUqmyHAMoUQ==)

subject: Historic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This week, Governor Holcomb and legislative leaders came to agreement on the next state budget. The only word to describe this budget is historic. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470410?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Historic**_ This week, Governor Holcomb and legislative leaders came to agreement on the next state budget. The only word to describe this budget is historic. Because of conservative fiscal management, a COVID response that balanced lives and livelihoods, and quick economic bounce back, Indiana is able to invest in our people, communities, infrastructure, and schools unlike ever before. Indiana accomplished these things while paying off long-term debt and without raising taxes and making the drastic cuts that other states have had to make. Under Governor Holcomb, Indiana is roaring back!

I spent a good portion of this week in Dallas for a Republican National Committee meeting. There is a good amount of excitement and enthusiasm among Republicans nationwide for the upcoming 2022 elections. After roughly 100 days of the Biden administration, we know how important it is to break the Democrat stranglehold on power in Washington. It seems that every day that passes, Pelosi, Biden, and the Squad come up with a new leftwing idea that they want to use your tax dollars to pay for. Meanwhile, our border is overrun, spending is out of control, and our standing on the world stage grows weaker. A unified GOP will help get our country back on track in 2022, and this week’s meetings in Dallas were an important step in that direction.

Thanks Kyle

**Photo** : _Chairman Hupfer chairs the rules committee elections at this week's Republican National Committee meeting._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Next Level Wins**_ This week, **Governor Holcomb** and our state's legislative leaders announced our next state budget. This budget plan is truly historic because we are able to invest in Hoosiers, infrastructure and education unlike ever before. Thanks to **Governor Holcomb's** fiscally conservative leadership we were able to accomplish this without raising taxes and making drastic cuts like other state's have had to make. Under this budget plan, we're making historic investments in Hoosier teachers and education. A record breaking $1.9 billion new dollars will go toward K-12 education. The video of this week's budget announcement can be viewed here: [https://www.facebook.com/watch/live/?v=281281393493413&ref=search](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6e76149acb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
_**“This budget truly is transformational, transformational when it comes to investments, we're going to make in people first and foremost." -Governor Holcomb**_ **Governor Holcomb** also signed a number of bills from his 2021 Next Level Agenda, including:
* HEA 1449- Expanding rural broadband
* HEA 1199- Making it easier for Hoosiers to restore driving privileges
* HEA 1437- Permanently allows virtual options for government meetings
* HEA 1309- Pregnancy accommodations
* SEA 3- Permanently allowing certain telehealth services

**Governor Holcomb** also signed an executive order for all executive branch agencies to make reasonable accommodations for expecting mothers. “Strongly promoting the implementation of pregnancy accommodations will assist the state in recruiting and retaining a skilled and talented work force,” the governor added. To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b8d847372c&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4dfd89bcbf&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d2439668b&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb speaks at this week's budget announcement._
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Mike Pence Recovering Well and Back at Work**_ We are happy to hear that former Vice President Mike Pence is on the road to recovery and is even back at work!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Gov. Holcomb to speak at The Economic Club of Indiana **_ Mark your calendars! Governor Eric Holcomb will speak via Zoom to the Economic Club of Indiana on April 27. For more details and to register for the webinar, click here: [https://www.economicclubofindiana.com/product/april-2021-luncheon/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e132c41d5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[April 23](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=29761b008f&e=1acd9bb3d6): Johnson County Lincoln Day Dinner
[April 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=180001f036&e=1acd9bb3d6): Tipton County Lincoln Day Dinner
[May 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=699c1c74fc&e=1acd9bb3d6): 2021 IFRW Spring Luncheon
[May 1](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c3f31fd7ea&e=1acd9bb3d6): Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner
---
| |
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[announces transformational budget](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=22363b738c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[announces recipients of COVID Response Grants](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3dee936267&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Treasurer Kelly Mitchell **[celebrates Earth Day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=33203ba379&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Auditor Tera Klutz **[warns of a possible scam](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d50bda4699&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Secretary of State Holli Sullivan **[speaks at Hamilton County GOP breakfast](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b058c5d1f0&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Attorney General Todd Rokita **[passes 100 days in office](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=973a4554bd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[attends Sikh vigil honoring FedEx shooting victims](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=81a403bd51&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[criticizes the radical left's court packing proposal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a01006eff3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[introduces bill to working families pay for child care](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9531265c01&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[calls on Biden to visit border](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d106611a9&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird **[speaks against Biden's "infrastructure" bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=00ebb9eec8&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz**[speaks against DC statehood](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0d88e68515&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence **[honors victims of FedEx shooting](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fa9b2893cb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[agrees that packing the court is a "bonehead idea"](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a39ceb699&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth**[visits Foam Fabricators in New Albany](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ef1e32af21&e=1acd9bb3d6)

The video of this week's budget announcement can be viewed here: “This budget truly is transformational, transformational when it comes to investments, we're going to make in people first and foremost." -Governor Holcomb Governor Holcomb also signed a number of bills from his 2021 Next Level Agenda, including: HEA 1449- Expanding rural broadband HEA 1199- Making it easier for Hoosiers to restore driving privileges HEA 1437- Permanently allows virtual options for government meetings HEA 1309- Pregnancy accommodations SEA 3- Permanently allowing certain telehealth services Governor Holcomb also signed an executive order for all executive branch agencies to make reasonable accommodations for expecting mothers. “Strongly promoting the implementation of pregnancy accommodations will assist the state in recruiting and retaining a skilled and talented work force,” the governor added. To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , , and ! Photo: Governor Holcomb speaks at this week's budget announcement. | | | Mike Pence Recovering Well and Back at Work We are happy to hear that former Vice President Mike Pence is on the road to recovery and is even back at work! | | | Gov. Holcomb to speak at The Economic Club of Indiana Mark your calendars! Governor Eric Holcomb will speak via Zoom to the Economic Club of Indiana on April 27. For more details and to register for the webinar, click here: | | Upcoming Republican Events : Johnson County Lincoln Day Dinner : Tipton County Lincoln Day Dinner : 2021 IFRW Spring Luncheon : Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Date: Tuesday, April 6th, 2021
Subject: ALERT: Nancy Pelosi supports Gov. Gavin Newsom

This is unbelievable. **Nancy Pelosi is siding with Gov. Gavin Newsom against the recall movement. Worse, she is mobilizing national support to help him hold his position!** _Friend, I can 't stress this enough -- we need ALL hands on deck IMMEDIATELY. _ Gavin Newsom has done enough damage to the people of California by shuttering businesses, failing to open schools, ineffectively distributing vaccines, and so much more. It's time for him to go. I'm asking Americans on both sides of the aisle to take a stand. Will you join the effort to recall Gavin Newsom? name: Mr. Snerdley
subject: Maxine Waters' Race War
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226588:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "Tolerant
Liberal") Peter: BLM and the teacher's union have infiltrated America's schools with their PC style, Marxist doctrine, and critical race theory. Your kids are being taught that 2+2=Racism. **What happened to reading, writing, and arithmetic?_Do you think that China is teaching their children this nonsense?_** We need new leaders in Congress, leaders who understand that hijacking our education system to push your poisonous worldview is unforgivable. **[We need leaders who aren't afraid to FIGHT BACK.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226588:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "We need
leaders who aren't afraid to FIGHT BACK.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226588:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "Rush")**My name is James Golden, but you may know me better as Bo Snerdley - the man behind the glass listening to the one and only Rush Limbaugh for more than 30 years.** Rush talked about this issue for years, and if we don't do something now, it will be too late for an entire generation of kids in America. I won't sit back and watch them do this to our kids. **[Will you stand with us in this fight to place freedom-loving leaders that dare to stand against the left and uphold our Constitution in Congress? Join us TODAY with your gift of $45, $100, or even $1,000.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226589:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "Will you stand with us in this fight to place freedom-loving
leaders that dare to stand against the left and uphold our Constitution in Congress? Join us TODAY with your gift of $45, $100, or even $1,000.")** **As we witnessed from Auntie Maxine's tirade in Minnesota the other night, the left LOVES racial division in this nation - it is their bread and butter. Like so many other progressives, she celebrates the destruction of black communities but has done nothing in almost 60 years to help Black Americans achieve the American Dream.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226588:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "Maxine Waters")For decades, they've wanted to incite racial tensions, dwell on the past with calls for reparations, and have failed to teach our children anything better. It's simply a ploy for leftist black democrats and their friends like Joe Biden to keep their grasp on POWER--by putting down other Black Americans. I started the New Journey PAC to show Black America a better way to support Black Conservative candidates who will stand up to the liberals trying to poison our kids and who will foster policies that help Black America truly embrace the American Dream, not government handouts. I was raised to believe that not everything in this life is about race - somehow, that notion is offensive to modern liberals. They want to make EVERYTHING in your life about race no matter how far they have to stretch the truth to make their narrative fit. **The left has orchestrated a masterful attack on our Constitution, our voting rights, and inciting race wars that our team can barely keep up with the demands so we can counter their lies and educate Black America on the truth --like how Black Americans must rely upon the Second Amendment when Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi remove community policing from minority neighborhoods.** **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $45 at this time will help us have a FIVE-FOLD impact on our efforts to fight the progressive race wars being promoted by Maxine Waters and other radical leftists.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226590:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, even just $45 at this time will help us have a FIVE-FOLD impact on our efforts to fight the
progressive race wars being promoted by Maxine Waters and other radical leftists.")** We can help Black America overcome decades of lies and destruction, but only if we start RIGHT NOW. Don't delay, **[please donate to our efforts today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226588:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "please donate to our efforts today.")** Time for a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57226588:JWIMoFuNp:m:1:3206719985:3A432D339EB46993C5615153EEAD2FED:r "James

We need to do all we can to make sure that PA-07 goes blue in 2022. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = Republicans came close to winning in 2020. body:
%%First Name%%, we hope you didn't miss this email from Senator Tim Scott. He is going to give the Official GOP Response to Joe Biden's first address to Congress and we need you on our team.

Friend, we hope you didn't miss this email from Senator Tim Scott.

He is going to give the **Official GOP Response** to Joe Biden's first address to Congress and we need you on our team.

[**Tim set an ambitious goal of activating 15,000 patriots and we need you to chip in whatever you can afford to stand with Tim.**](http://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_USA-GOP-XX.100476_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=USA-GOP-XX.100476&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/)
[Chip In Now](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_USA-GOP-XX.100476_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=USA-GOP-XX.100476&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/)
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Tim Scott <info@votetimscott.com>
Date: 4/22/2021
Subject: BIG NEWS: I'm giving the Official GOP Response to Biden

Friend,

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted you to hear this BIG NEWS from me first.

**I will be delivering the Official GOP Response to President Biden 's first address to Congress.**

I am grateful and honored to have the opportunity to share my positive conservative message with millions of Americans.

While I am excited to have this platform, I also know that the far Left and liberal media are already gearing up to attack me.

_**Friend, I have set an ambitious goal of ACTIVATING 15,000 patriots to stand with me before I give my speech.**_
[Stand with Me](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_USA-GOP-XX.100476_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=USA-GOP-XX.100476&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/)
---

[**A donation of $10, $25, $50 or whatever amount you can afford will help us prepare for the attacks from the Left.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_USA-GOP-XX.100476_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=USA-GOP-XX.100476&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/)

You see, the liberal media has always tried to silence my voice. A Black conservative from South Carolina does not fit the narrative the media tries to create about the Republican Party.

_They don 't want to acknowledge the uniquely American journey of my family--from cotton to Congress in one generation.

They don't want to hear my story of growing up in a single-parent household and nearly failing out of high school, but rising above it to find success.

They don't want to hear about me becoming the first Black Senator elected from the South since Reconstruction._

[**Friend, please dig deep and make whatever donation you can afford to join our team.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_USA-GOP-XX.100476_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=USA-GOP-XX.100476&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/) As I write, I'm sure Democrats and the liberal media are already attacking me for speaking out about my conservative journey.

I need you to stand with me.
[Stand with Me](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_USA-GOP-XX.100476_tim-scott_t1059308-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=USA-GOP-XX.100476&utm_content=20210423_fwd-did-you-see-tims-email/)

He is going to give the Official GOP Response to Joe Biden's first address to Congress and we need you on our team. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tim Scott <info@votetimscott.com> Date: 4/22/2021 Subject: BIG NEWS: I'm giving the Official GOP Response to Biden Friend, As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted you to hear this BIG NEWS from me first. I will be delivering the Official GOP Response to President Biden 's first address to Congress. I am grateful and honored to have the opportunity to share my positive conservative message with millions of Americans. While I am excited to have this platform, I also know that the far Left and liberal media are already gearing up to attack me. Friend, I have set an ambitious goal of ACTIVATING 15,000 patriots to stand with me before I give my speech. You see, the liberal media has always tried to silence my voice. A Black conservative from South Carolina does not fit the narrative the media tries to create about the Republican Party. They don 't want to acknowledge the uniquely American journey of my family--from cotton to Congress in one generation. They don't want to hear my story of growing up in a single-parent household and nearly failing out of high school, but rising above it to find success. They don't want to hear about me becoming the first Black Senator elected from the South since Reconstruction. As I write, I'm sure Democrats and the liberal media are already attacking me for speaking out about my conservative journey. I need you to stand with me. Tim Scott PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 | | TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE | 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD, CHARLESTON, SC 29407 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

name: Action (LeftAction)
subject: The most embarrassing White House press conference ever?
body:
One year ago today, the sitting president suggested injecting bleach to fight the virus. Happy bleach-iversary!
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/bleach-1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_

|
---
| | | Hi Friend, **One year ago today, the sitting president suggested injecting bleach to fight the virus.** Happy bleach-iversary!
* [Watch the madness as it unfolded (including the real time reaction from Dr. Birx)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T749c5c6c-0860-4b20-a889-8c428228a78a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Watch Sarah Cooper’s hilarious take on it that spread like wildfire](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5840185b-cb0f-40a8-a4db-c37792f9c9ff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Thank President Biden for all he’s doing, and for not suggesting injecting bleach](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32f6958e-9f15-4f75-b129-e7763698be69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Tell Lindsay Graham he’s a jerk (not related, but always worth making time for)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T131fb220-e9a0-4c9c-8737-17bdffa67435/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Click here for other actions](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te68b5e8d-d1b2-48ca-a74b-143dff209ae1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

And remember, folks, just say no to bleach!

****
Fellow Conservative, Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo could not have been more clear: he is determined to take back the House for Republicans and defeat Nancy Pelosi's socialist agenda.

But he can't do it without your help. That's why we're reaching out one last time to make sure you've read his message. [**Will you commit to joining Mike Pompeo in this fight to take back the House TODAY?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZUr-kqB8MjfZmHgjYyK3IkfFlSuUwAA6izWcD-qQB1-jDwZHyHXiL32amAggqzHd4UFKp7fpmKxlALmuiyki6Rd78ZTUHSBH_CCGDgvsFavwGCUhWcmTAv4E1vlDcDqYBt--C7TVvgcWOxokb_Omj1STnm-XYZzh5CgLF96Jfza952f6xBadzD_5WPq3V_ldgUhHaCbpPK4SSxQJuEyw2heeeBRQzt-XD7K7fRZrjdmmLj2OrfeusQq-p7mo7h3TShHxPaMouCNJBmi89iboZIFvsXPeO2FjaqmrFNiIdPEMm_8NCO3eWlB4n1-Z_huhWy_Sfkf4KMcew09pJhCEmWVF9kISN57qtehjdaP2NjjiGopNwr4Je8ACrNVElCZlxOBKCoqm8NxOXDEFbJulhOmp0mgKBATRaRVvy6M6FeC7Re6de3CNFHgUTRMy-wca2JgIWl2Q636_FvqVnlC7fQ7wgPA60hdqx0MH20ROpX5HuaIug89BOA==&c=qGDTqHXWsVdTHku1QxlpDCNfUkzyMCZiJrDOM56kAG9En4CwocLBUg==&ch=Kpz2WhakrzKvc47Y0wajnRUev3qb7VMm_p3wfoLrkVWnbag5r8jiBw==)
_
It 's so important we've extended 500% MATCHING until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT!_

**500% Matching Activated**

[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZUr-kqB8MjfZmHgjYyK3IkfFlSuUwAA6izWcD-qQB1-jDwZHyHXiL32amAggqzHd4UFKp7fpmKxlALmuiyki6Rd78ZTUHSBH_CCGDgvsFavwGCUhWcmTAv4E1vlDcDqYBt--C7TVvgcWOxokb_Omj1STnm-XYZzh5CgLF96Jfza952f6xBadzD_5WPq3V_ldgUhHaCbpPK4SSxQJuEyw2heeeBRQzt-XD7K7fRZrjdmmLj2OrfeusQq-p7mo7h3TShHxPaMouCNJBmi89iboZIFvsXPeO2FjaqmrFNiIdPEMm_8NCO3eWlB4n1-Z_huhWy_Sfkf4KMcew09pJhCEmWVF9kISN57qtehjdaP2NjjiGopNwr4Je8ACrNVElCZlxOBKCoqm8NxOXDEFbJulhOmp0mgKBATRaRVvy6M6FeC7Re6de3CNFHgUTRMy-wca2JgIWl2Q636_FvqVnlC7fQ7wgPA60hdqx0MH20ROpX5HuaIug89BOA==&c=qGDTqHXWsVdTHku1QxlpDCNfUkzyMCZiJrDOM56kAG9En4CwocLBUg==&ch=Kpz2WhakrzKvc47Y0wajnRUev3qb7VMm_p3wfoLrkVWnbag5r8jiBw==)

Nancy Pelosi's radical agenda will dismantle and destroy our nation. This is your last chance to fight back, arm in arm with Mike Pompeo, Fellow Conservative. We won't ask again.

Thank you,

House Republicans

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Secretary Mike Pompeo
Date: Mon, Apr 19, 2021 at 12:27 PM
Subject: Taking Back the House is my FIRST Priority
To: Fellow Conservative <[**Patriot**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZUr-kqB8MjfZmHgjYyK3IkfFlSuUwAA6izWcD-qQB1-jDwZHyHXiL32amAggqzHd4UFKp7fpmKxlALmuiyki6Rd78ZTUHSBH_CCGDgvsFavwGCUhWcmTAv4E1vlDcDqYBt--C7TVvgcWOxokb_Omj1STnm-XYZzh5CgLF96Jfza952f6xBadzD_5WPq3V_ldgUhHaCbpPK4SSxQJuEyw2heeeBRQzt-XD7K7fRZrjdmmLj2OrfeusQq-p7mo7h3TShHxPaMouCNJBmi89iboZIFvsXPeO2FjaqmrFNiIdPEMm_8NCO3eWlB4n1-Z_huhWy_Sfkf4KMcew09pJhCEmWVF9kISN57qtehjdaP2NjjiGopNwr4Je8ACrNVElCZlxOBKCoqm8NxOXDEFbJulhOmp0mgKBATRaRVvy6M6FeC7Re6de3CNFHgUTRMy-wca2JgIWl2Q636_FvqVnlC7fQ7wgPA60hdqx0MH20ROpX5HuaIug89BOA==&c=qGDTqHXWsVdTHku1QxlpDCNfUkzyMCZiJrDOM56kAG9En4CwocLBUg==&ch=Kpz2WhakrzKvc47Y0wajnRUev3qb7VMm_p3wfoLrkVWnbag5r8jiBw==)>

Fellow Conservative, it's Mike Pompeo.

Let me be clear: My MAIN priority right now is taking back the House for Republicans and FIRING Nancy Pelosi once and for all.

**Without a Republican-held Congress, we leave the door wide open for the Radical Left to dominate Biden 's agenda.**

A Conservative Majority will bring back sanity and commonsense solutions that our Nation desperately needs, but we cannot do it without your help, Fellow Conservative. [**Will you commit to joining me in our fight to take back the House TODAY?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZUr-kqB8MjfZmHgjYyK3IkfFlSuUwAA6izWcD-qQB1-jDwZHyHXiL32amAggqzHd4UFKp7fpmKxlALmuiyki6Rd78ZTUHSBH_CCGDgvsFavwGCUhWcmTAv4E1vlDcDqYBt--C7TVvgcWOxokb_Omj1STnm-XYZzh5CgLF96Jfza952f6xBadzD_5WPq3V_ldgUhHaCbpPK4SSxQJuEyw2heeeBRQzt-XD7K7fRZrjdmmLj2OrfeusQq-p7mo7h3TShHxPaMouCNJBmi89iboZIFvsXPeO2FjaqmrFNiIdPEMm_8NCO3eWlB4n1-Z_huhWy_Sfkf4KMcew09pJhCEmWVF9kISN57qtehjdaP2NjjiGopNwr4Je8ACrNVElCZlxOBKCoqm8NxOXDEFbJulhOmp0mgKBATRaRVvy6M6FeC7Re6de3CNFHgUTRMy-wca2JgIWl2Q636_FvqVnlC7fQ7wgPA60hdqx0MH20ROpX5HuaIug89BOA==&c=qGDTqHXWsVdTHku1QxlpDCNfUkzyMCZiJrDOM56kAG9En4CwocLBUg==&ch=Kpz2WhakrzKvc47Y0wajnRUev3qb7VMm_p3wfoLrkVWnbag5r8jiBw==)

[**TAKE BACK THE HOUSE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZUr-kqB8MjfZmHgjYyK3IkfFlSuUwAA6izWcD-qQB1-jDwZHyHXiL32amAggqzHd4UFKp7fpmKxlALmuiyki6Rd78ZTUHSBH_CCGDgvsFavwGCUhWcmTAv4E1vlDcDqYBt--C7TVvgcWOxokb_Omj1STnm-XYZzh5CgLF96Jfza952f6xBadzD_5WPq3V_ldgUhHaCbpPK4SSxQJuEyw2heeeBRQzt-XD7K7fRZrjdmmLj2OrfeusQq-p7mo7h3TShHxPaMouCNJBmi89iboZIFvsXPeO2FjaqmrFNiIdPEMm_8NCO3eWlB4n1-Z_huhWy_Sfkf4KMcew09pJhCEmWVF9kISN57qtehjdaP2NjjiGopNwr4Je8ACrNVElCZlxOBKCoqm8NxOXDEFbJulhOmp0mgKBATRaRVvy6M6FeC7Re6de3CNFHgUTRMy-wca2JgIWl2Q636_FvqVnlC7fQ7wgPA60hdqx0MH20ROpX5HuaIug89BOA==&c=qGDTqHXWsVdTHku1QxlpDCNfUkzyMCZiJrDOM56kAG9En4CwocLBUg==&ch=Kpz2WhakrzKvc47Y0wajnRUev3qb7VMm_p3wfoLrkVWnbag5r8jiBw==)

Nancy Pelosi is hanging on to the smallest majority in Decades and we're only **FIVE** seats away from taking back a Republican majority in the House. We are SO close, Fellow Conservative!

It's absolutely necessary that EVERY patriot chip in to take back the House and FIRE Pelosi, which is why I've authorized a 500% matching opportunity for top conservative supporters ONLY.

Taking back a conservative majority in the House means:
1. An America FIRST foreign policy agenda that prioritizes our nation's security above all else
2. A strong and well-trained American military capable of protecting our beloved country
3. Fair trade policies that benefit OUR economy (not China's!), protect our small businesses, and lower taxes for American families

That's what's on the line right now -- and it's why we've activated a _**500% match**_ _on all contributions made before MIDNIGHT tonight._

**500% Matching Activated**

clean_body: Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo could not have been more clear. ** Fellow Conservative, Former Secretary of State Mike Pompeo could not have been more clear: he is determined to take back the House for Republicans and defeat Nancy Pelosi's socialist agenda. But he can't do it without your help. That's why we're reaching out one last time to make sure you've read his message. == It 's so important we've extended 500% MATCHING until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! 500% Matching Activated == Nancy Pelosi's radical agenda will dismantle and destroy our nation. This is your last chance to fight back, arm in arm with Mike Pompeo, Fellow Conservative. We won't ask again. Thank you, House Republicans \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Secretary Mike Pompeo Date: Mon, Apr 19, 2021 at 12:27 PM Subject: Taking Back the House is my FIRST Priority To: Fellow Conservative <==> Fellow Conservative, it's Mike Pompeo. Let me be clear: My MAIN priority right now is taking back the House for Republicans and FIRING Nancy Pelosi once and for all. Without a Republican-held Congress, we leave the door wide open for the Radical Left to dominate Biden 's agenda. A Conservative Majority will bring back sanity and commonsense solutions that our Nation desperately needs, but we cannot do it without your help, Fellow Conservative. == 500% Matching Activated == Nancy Pelosi is hanging on to the smallest majority in Decades and we're only FIVE seats away from taking back a Republican majority in the House. We are SO close, Fellow Conservative! It's absolutely necessary that EVERY patriot chip in to take back the House and FIRE Pelosi, which is why I've authorized a 500% matching opportunity for top conservative supporters ONLY. Taking back a conservative majority in the House means: 1. An America FIRST foreign policy agenda that prioritizes our nation's security above all else 2. A strong and well-trained American military capable of protecting our beloved country 3. Fair trade policies that benefit OUR economy (not China's!), protect our small businesses, and lower taxes for American families That's what's on the line right now -- and it's why we've activated a 500% match on all contributions made before MIDNIGHT tonight. 500% Matching Activated == == == == == The future of our nation is in your hands, Fellow Conservative. Don't miss your opportunity to take a stand against the Radical Left, and help us take back the House for America First conservatives. Thank you, Mike Pompeo 70th United States Secretary of State Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. == NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (58606). body:
Hi there -- this is really important and we didn't want you to miss it.
Dark money and Republican special interest groups poured millions of dollars into New Hampshire in 2016 to try and beat Maggie Hassan -- and they almost succeeded. **When the dust settled, she won by just 1,017 votes.**
The Senator emailed yesterday because we're falling behind on our April fundraising goal. **In a race this close, falling behind even once could mean losing this seat.**
[**To close the gap, we 've set a grassroots fundraising goal of $25,000 before midnight on Sunday, and Maggie is relying on your donation to get there. Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can right now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c3/2a380d31/267d3fb7/f070be/3734052808/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyM19nb2FsLWtfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210423_goal-k_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for helping!
_\---------------Original Message---------------_
Hello,
In just a second, I'm going to ask you to chip in to our campaign. But before I do, I'd like to update you on where things stand in our race, and why we need your help right now.
The minute I announced my campaign, I knew it would be a tough fight ahead. Dark money and Republican special interest groups poured millions of dollars into New Hampshire in 2016 to try and beat me -- and they almost succeeded. **When the dust settled, I won by just 1,017 votes.**
Now, with Democrats holding a razor-thin Senate majority, Republicans are doing whatever they can to win this seat. The Koch network and Mitch McConnell's super PAC are already spending big on attack ads in New Hampshire, and election experts are saying this seat is one of the most likely to flip to the GOP.
My team told me that we're falling behind on our April fundraising goal. [**To close the gap, we 've set a grassroots fundraising goal of $25,000 before midnight on Sunday. Can you please chip in $3 today to keep the Senate blue and defend our progress?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c3/2a380d31/267d3fb7/f070be/3734052808/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyM19nb2FsLWtfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210423_goal-k_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c3/2a380d31/267d3fb7/f070bf/3734052808/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyM19nb2FsLWtfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiMyJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210423_goal-k_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c3/2a380d31/267d3fb7/f070b8/3734052808/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyM19nb2FsLWtfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFpQjlmUT09IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210423_goal-k_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c3/2a380d31/267d3fb7/f070b9/3734052808/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyM19nb2FsLWtfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVF5QjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210423_goal-k_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c3/2a380d31/267d3fb7/f070be/3734052808/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyM19nb2FsLWtfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210423_goal-k_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
I truly believe that together we can make a difference. That's why I first ran for office -- to advocate for families and kids who weren't getting the support they needed. And that's the spirit I'm asking you to embrace today by standing with me ahead of our crucial deadline.
I could really use your help today, everyone. Every deadline is a test of our momentum, and I'm worried about what might happen if we fall short. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking you today to chip in $3 or whatever you can to keep New Hampshire blue.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc8c3/2a380d31/267d3fb7/f070be/3734052808/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQyM19nb2FsLWtfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210423_goal-k_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for your support. I mean it when I say we can't do this without you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: John Burke
subject: Our kids are “substantially hurt” by school closures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Kevin Faulconer is fighting for ALL of our California kids. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f09e943af68c1310/1dfffbfac62bb987c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, The science is clear: school closures are hurting our students. **Multiple studies from all over the world have shown that school closures have had a negative effect on our youth. A recent survey from UCLA concluded that parents believe their children have been “substantially hurt” by the school closures.** **[Click here to read the article in the LA Times about it>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f09e943af68c1310/29402b1fa1184471c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** Overall satisfaction with public schools in California is at historic lows, and Gavin Newsom still won’t call for schools to reopen full time! We have over a year of data now. We KNOW that kids are at very low risk of spreading the virus, and that schools CAN be safely opened. They’re doing it in other states, and even in private schools right here in California. It’s time to stop putting our public-school families at a disadvantage, and get ALL of our kids back into the classroom. **Kevin is going to bat for our kids and families, and fighting hard to make sure our schools open.** How much further do our kids need to fall behind before we demand change? Stand with Kevin and demand that our schools do what they’re supposed to do once again: _Serve our kids, families, and communities._ Thanks for your support,
John Burke, Communications Director | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f09e943af68c1310/8fc8c405e6e36411c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f09e943af68c1310/54c3b42ed9de1c0bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/f09e943af68c1310/1fe02bbd5a624ac9c3d6b838967d376c/34943)

body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r7OH3tzcQXZryMX-HhSjqK9tPoe0HPafiggleEwdxCbX7T3rQbOUDiJOAAT3_8iHbe7PwekIGGRltQC8gcYpiqPoqD_eVRPSZxoXwPg4P6G_TjE726qqkHWMIpeVtNPUJlqUJ162fd3BUNM6N7AytUNGsEiEOd8jNKdsElbyu6Iq4VqyQb5mYhUarqVYYgoPPi-Xsd7cBprc69YFlHzEAEikM1l_pEdOl6n1_5xopIdo6sxCE70kHe48LIGF-zddd9sYq9bknXHTtRA-6gZrFBEe2gqQxX3m5a7SwCUfTiUPLJ4zr7bW8aBQtUi7LbLAAo95rwV5_wxug5nBuBuG9HTxQiBpF590frYfo5e23VPaeVvxnZEXHRQjMXQPWJnkUB0qU1vWab17cs6ejYWY27N4kSLZ1UdW6eFBtvHJYcV8e-Dgnne-jYN6bZ5tz0Gh&c=jMiZAhan9myVwjxwFuWsXdMvSYnnYCm7XQa3c0uNcpEDIgB_45pOcA==&ch=W5RlLN-gIYb-5YSzmw1jiKCswqBstcxbAl3tPOHqbjGeRHN4QVzQxw==)
Friend -- Democrats rammed a massive $1.9 trillion, so-called "COVID relief" bill through Congress.

**Now, liberal states want to use that money to give $15,600 debit cards to illegal immigrants. **

I'm taking action to stop this, and I wanted you to be one of the first to hear about it.
