name: Giffords.org
subject: There has been a mass shooting every day in 2021.
body:
#

Friends,
Since the beginning of 2021, the U.S. has averaged more than one mass shooting where four or more people are shot each day.
Unfortunately, this isn't unthinkable. This continues a trend we've seen over the past few years. In 2020, we saw a record high of 610 mass shootings.
It doesn't have to be this way.
These numbers are more than statistics. They are mothers, fathers, sisters, brothers, grandparents and children whose lives were tragically cut short. They are hopes and dreams dashed, and families and communities changed forever.
And the truth is, many of these lives would have been saved if simple measures like universal background checks were signed into law.
Here at Giffords, we are making it our mission to pass universal background checks so we can save lives. Which is why we need to ask:
[**Can you make a $5 donation to Giffords PAC? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving background checks legislation that is waiting in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a9214c/2445976106/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210423-1-full")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a92141/2445976106/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210423-1-full") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a92140/2445976106/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210423-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a92143/2445976106/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210423-1-full") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a92142/2445976106/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210423-1-full")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a92145/2445976106/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210423-1-full") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a9214e/2445976106/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210423-1-full")

Americans will continue to face danger and uncertainty if universal background checks are not signed into law. But it doesn't have to be that way. With your $5 donation, we are going to go straight to work to make sure that gun safety laws are passed.
Your $5 not only helps us do the work, but it's a symbol to Congress that Americans are demanding action on gun safety right now.
Thank you for helping us save lives.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a9214c/2445976106/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjMtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210423-1-full")**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee0a3/78fba3aa/7c6f9d5d/50a92144/2445976106/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: Team Hawley
subject: FWD: we’re breaking up big tech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
This week Josh introduced legislation to break up big tech [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d6429345393e41489d79f3a24ddb83a4&_e=Tu8bSfyPY26OAirGccplO9_l3NQSsWhloevz3ttyMgeflIezEzHVAqHKc7A657glhp2lYwwsRHcmdIE5JIlhb30sUeEWw92CM4tLLjFWikAD0Jx5zMVHy_BcD0P-FsQrFgICUPyqvou2P2mjLnXHepdXAlL9vEE0eqt0I_yBBrYG0FBkipOQHpOYX71x7sghg7zOjcxYGyNn9BBDongLGm4kgMP7ZXsfnnoEK7OFbamhh_vU21AVFmq7igID96U2mJ4BuenfJhFrDmi3xQrHJrBX16JCBheQ-8Tf_MgkuZ8DmqHHZNWzE32HcT4ef0Fm0iT7QjN6xcgzRZqMDUZ1D8pbl3LP5Suw5_8JNrH9QP5LDBD5uH32JbA2Ou3PYh1Nowf0wFrk5zKri_5BNXvi1A%3D%3D) Peter, Did you see this email from Josh?

This week he introduced legislation to break up big tech, because the days of big-tech regulating free speech and picking winners and losers must end. Did you know that Obama/Biden Administration regulators repeatedly gave Google a pass when it comes to enforcing regulations? And the same tech giants who received preferential treatment are repaying the favor and operating like digital oligarchs, censoring, silencing, and suppressing conservative voices. On Fox News this week, Josh said, “We have to break them up; those who are monopolies like the tech corporations.” **[WATCH JOSH ON FOX NEWS>>> HERE](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d6429345393e41489d79f3a24ddb83a4&_e=Tu8bSfyPY26OAirGccplO9_l3NQSsWhloevz3ttyMgeflIezEzHVAqHKc7A657glvDcUrTkTyUIBHUxCgWyeyziXFak_LJnleeJcqswdAqQk4P-alHNoEramc8fQLc3WcgfQROoelwi204DR-fGqd326_GjPkV_XJY19Rxn61804o5lb4xa4xecWF6bwXKWL1xQbFAnC-yhKFggJedcldV4wdW9JPRA9DybMvaCEYe5TENjTMHUWpymTyK6_haGapmhkslA_1Vamnp9DXEeL-dDQsR5x6cGYLR4BTnnGq3qNF3UDI9uj4z96Nwvc4kyZxfSrRoV9hTNRcBK01qNNGSCKThNRF-08Cv0sPa0cLFGxJygxAnx-59Ufh1r0HJeNR2TB5GXd6k7AYAOsL6gLNA%3D%3D)** Join Team Hawley, and help make your voice heard — the days of digital oligarchs are numbered. Thanks, Team Hawley | |

Peter,
Today, I introduced legislation to **BREAK UP BIG-TECH. **

This landmark legislation will level the playing field, cut these digital oligarchs down to size and allow capitalism to flourish without the thumb of Silicon Valley’s monopoly tipping the scales to their favor!

For too long, everyday Americans have been at the mercy of Silicon Valley.

ENOUGH IS ENOUGH — I WON’T STAND ON THE SIDELINES.

clean_body: This week Josh introduced legislation to break up big tech Peter, Did you see this email from Josh? This week he introduced legislation to break up big tech, because the days of big-tech regulating free speech and picking winners and losers must end. Did you know that Obama/Biden Administration regulators repeatedly gave Google a pass when it comes to enforcing regulations? And the same tech giants who received preferential treatment are repaying the favor and operating like digital oligarchs, censoring, silencing, and suppressing conservative voices. On Fox News this week, Josh said, “We have to break them up; those who are monopolies like the tech corporations.” Join Team Hawley, and help make your voice heard — the days of digital oligarchs are numbered. Thanks, Team Hawley | | \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Date: April 19, 2021 Subject: we’re breaking up big tech Peter, Today, I introduced legislation to BREAK UP BIG-TECH. This landmark legislation will level the playing field, cut these digital oligarchs down to size and allow capitalism to flourish without the thumb of Silicon Valley’s monopoly tipping the scales to their favor! For too long, everyday Americans have been at the mercy of Silicon Valley. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH — I WON’T STAND ON THE SIDELINES. I'm tired of conservative viewpoints being censored, silenced, and suppressed! Join with me and send a message to the left that the days of Silicon Valley doing the Democratic Party’s bidding are numbered. God bless, Josh Hawley P.S. name: Seth Moulton
subject: We got accountability, now we must transform policing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28112120/282218646/-1416185584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzNkMzQwNS03MmE0LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Djicur42X7U-yz8FnT5u9z1z0OidKo2KGAaJ7ynUDtI=&emci=f621bd63-3ca4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e73d3405-72a4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769) Friend, Last year, in every state and around the world, people of all colors, genders, and ages took to the streets to demand justice for George Floyd. Make no mistake: true justice would look like George still here with us right now, but this week’s verdict is proof that police officers are not above the law, and equally important, that Black lives matter. **Some measure of accountability has been served for George Floyd, now we must transform policing.** George Floyd was murdered in public and in broad daylight, in front of multiple witnesses, and the entire encounter was recorded on a cell phone for all to see. The fact that so many of us were anxiously waiting for a verdict to be issued is a reminder of how far we have to go to fix a deeply broken police and criminal justice system. The violent history of policing in the United States will continue if we fail to entirely transform the institution of policing. To start, we must root out racist and abusive police officers, create systems of accountability within the ranks, and establish stronger relationships between cops and the communities they serve. America isn’t a country that gets it all right, but at our best, we believe that we might. It will take work from everyone to finally live up to the promise of America—the promise of liberty and justice for all, including for Black Americans. We can’t wait for the next hashtag to make this a reality. -Seth | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28112121/282218647/1848844371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzNkMzQwNS03MmE0LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Djicur42X7U-yz8FnT5u9z1z0OidKo2KGAaJ7ynUDtI=&emci=f621bd63-3ca4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e73d3405-72a4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28112122/282218648/-1745464800?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzNkMzQwNS03MmE0LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Djicur42X7U-yz8FnT5u9z1z0OidKo2KGAaJ7ynUDtI=&emci=f621bd63-3ca4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e73d3405-72a4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28112123/282218649/341442065?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzNkMzQwNS03MmE0LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Djicur42X7U-yz8FnT5u9z1z0OidKo2KGAaJ7ynUDtI=&emci=f621bd63-3ca4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e73d3405-72a4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28112124/282218650/-368236352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzNkMzQwNS03MmE0LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Djicur42X7U-yz8FnT5u9z1z0OidKo2KGAaJ7ynUDtI=&emci=f621bd63-3ca4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e73d3405-72a4-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769)

clean_body: | | | Friend, Last year, in every state and around the world, people of all colors, genders, and ages took to the streets to demand justice for George Floyd. Make no mistake: true justice would look like George still here with us right now, but this week’s verdict is proof that police officers are not above the law, and equally important, that Black lives matter. Some measure of accountability has been served for George Floyd, now we must transform policing. George Floyd was murdered in public and in broad daylight, in front of multiple witnesses, and the entire encounter was recorded on a cell phone for all to see. The fact that so many of us were anxiously waiting for a verdict to be issued is a reminder of how far we have to go to fix a deeply broken police and criminal justice system. The violent history of policing in the United States will continue if we fail to entirely transform the institution of policing. To start, we must root out racist and abusive police officers, create systems of accountability within the ranks, and establish stronger relationships between cops and the communities they serve. America isn’t a country that gets it all right, but at our best, we believe that we might. It will take work from everyone to finally live up to the promise of America—the promise of liberty and justice for all, including for Black Americans. We can’t wait for the next hashtag to make this a reality. -Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Erica Smith for North Carolina
subject: I will fight for a Green New Deal in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
I will fight for a Green New Deal in the U.S. Senate.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/u0xy3ypzXglzUIT3AE7WGnFFfO6ePde0J90OLOE6Q0s=/Nr8zRLwVvORdyZp0YUnrdjbog9uZk3DN-S5b2XWncOQ=?refcode=em20210423-1)
**It 's time for bold climate action.**
The climate crisis is *already* here, and it's manifested itself most violently in our most vulnerable communities.
While serving in the North Carolina state senate, I saw my district get hit hard by raging storms and fierce floods that claimed lives and livelihoods, disproportionately hurting folks in communities without the resources to rebuild or relocate.
**Policy, not platitudes, is how we address this climate crisis and take on environmental injustice -- that's why, when I'm in the United States Senate, I will fight for a Green New Deal.**
[**_Will you chip in $10, or whatever you can, to help tackle the climate crisis and support our movement to create a more sustainable future for all of our communities?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/u0xy3ypzXglzUIT3AE7WGnFFfO6ePde0J90OLOE6Q0s=/Nr8zRLwVvORdyZp0YUnrdjbog9uZk3DN-S5b2XWncOQ=?refcode=em20210423-1)
**[Donate»](https://act.myngp.com/el/u0xy3ypzXglzUIT3AE7WGnFFfO6ePde0J90OLOE6Q0s=/Nr8zRLwVvORdyZp0YUnrdjbog9uZk3DN-S5b2XWncOQ=?refcode=em20210423-1)**
---
The Green New Deal is about saving our communities from an escalating climate crisis, ensuring everyone has clean air and water, and creating millions of good-paying jobs in the process.
We can reshape our economy to empower our communities and create a sustainable future for ourselves, our children, and our planet -- but we must be bold enough to fight for comprehensive climate action that delivers justice.
**As the _only_ candidate in this race proudly fighting for a Green New Deal, I'm asking:** [**_If you 're with me, will you chip in $10 (or whatever you can) directly to my campaign for the United States Senate today? Every donation will send a strong message about the energy and power behind our movement._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/u0xy3ypzXglzUIT3AE7WGnFFfO6ePde0J90OLOE6Q0s=/Nr8zRLwVvORdyZp0YUnrdjbog9uZk3DN-S5b2XWncOQ=?refcode=em20210423-1)
For all of us,
Erica
**[Donate»](https://act.myngp.com/el/u0xy3ypzXglzUIT3AE7WGnFFfO6ePde0J90OLOE6Q0s=/Nr8zRLwVvORdyZp0YUnrdjbog9uZk3DN-S5b2XWncOQ=?refcode=em20210423-1)**

name: 1-question @ VA Gov Tracker
subject: we want to know your thoughts…
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
We know you are a strong Democrat who supports historic campaigns. So we want to hear from you...
Do you think it’s time to make history and elect the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide?
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_ty_survey?refcode=reengagement_ngp&amount=25&recurring=1]
HECK YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_ty_survey?refcode=reengagement_ngp&amount=25&recurring=1]
Jennifer Carroll Foy is running to do just that! Her whole life, people have told her “no.”
No, you won’t make it out of Petersburg, VA.
No, you can’t graduate from the Virginia Military Institute -- but after the Supreme Court’s landmark decision to open its doors to women, she did and she was one of the FIRST women to do so.
No, you can’t win -- but when she ran for Delegate she not only won, she FLIPPED a Republican district in the process.
Every time, Jennifer Carroll Foy has proved the doubters wrong. And based on polling, she has the momentum to do it again running to be the FIRST Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.
She’s here to serve and she’s here to win but she can only do it with you by her side. Donate now. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_email?refcode=reengagement_NGP&amount=25&recurring=1]
Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.
She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.
Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. Help her make history. Donate now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_email?refcode=reengagement_NGP&amount=25&recurring=1]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_email?refcode=reengagement_NGP&amount=25&recurring=1 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_email?refcode=reengagement_NGP&amount=25&recurring=1]

clean_body: We know you are a strong Democrat who supports historic campaigns. So we want to hear from you... Do you think it’s time to make history and elect the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide? YES [] HECK YES [] Jennifer Carroll Foy is running to do just that! Her whole life, people have told her “no.” No, you won’t make it out of Petersburg, VA. No, you can’t graduate from the Virginia Military Institute -- but after the Supreme Court’s landmark decision to open its doors to women, she did and she was one of the FIRST women to do so. No, you can’t win -- but when she ran for Delegate she not only won, she FLIPPED a Republican district in the process. Every time, Jennifer Carroll Foy has proved the doubters wrong. And based on polling, she has the momentum to do it again running to be the FIRST Black woman to serve as governor nationwide. She’s here to serve and she’s here to win but she can only do it with you by her side. Donate now. [] Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. Help her make history. Donate now. [] [] CONTRIBUTE [] Paid for and authorized by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Tim Scott
subject: My family’s story is being fact-checked?!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
The mainstream has decided to fact-check my family's story of "cotton to Congress in one lifetime." That's right, The Washington Post has been investigating my family's history in the South and downplaying the struggles and racism they faced.

Friend,

The mainstream media has decided to fact-check my family's story of "cotton to Congress in one lifetime."

That's right, The Washington Post has been investigating my family's history in the South and downplaying the struggles and racism they faced.

**It 's shameful. Plain and simple.**

I am used to being attacked for daring to think differently, for daring to be a proud black conservative, and for daring to publicly stand up for what I believe.

But this latest attack from the mainstream media represents a new low -- even for them.

We should never allow this type of casual racism to go unanswered -- **I hope you agree we can do better.**
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/cotton-to-congress-fact/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059444-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_my-familys-story-is-being-fact-checked)
---

Let me explain. My family's journey is a complicated one, records weren't kept, and family history was passed down from generation to generation through storytelling.

But no amount of "fact-checking" or attacks from the mainstream media will EVER take away from the struggles that my family overcame.

My grandfather grew up a poor South Carolina cotton farmer in the Great Depression. Yet he lived long enough to see his grandson become the first African American elected to both the U.S. House and Senate.

He lived long enough to see his wildest dreams become a reality. From cotton to Congress in one lifetime!

We have to call out this casual racism against black Republicans when we see it. It's shameful and we cannot allow it to go unnoticed.
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/cotton-to-congress-fact/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059444-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_my-familys-story-is-being-fact-checked)
---

I wake up every single day working to ensure that future generations have the same opportunities that I did to succeed.

Every time I see a nasty insult from the Left or an unjust "fact-check," I am comforted knowing that there are patriots like you, Friend, who have my back.

Sadly, this won't be the last time we face insults, casual racism, or attacks from the Left. [**But with your help we can continue spreading the positive message of conservatism.**](http://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/cotton-to-congress-fact/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059444-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_my-familys-story-is-being-fact-checked)
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/cotton-to-congress-fact/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210423_TY-2.101720_tim-scott_t1059444-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210423_my-familys-story-is-being-fact-checked)
---

Artis Ware's Proud Grandson,

Senator Tim Scott
PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407
| | TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE | 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD, CHARLESTON, SC 29407

subject: ICYMI: HR 1 Is Attempted ‘Hostile Takeover’ of Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This morning, Fox News published a story about the Democrats’ attempted federal hijacking of our elections. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470414?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f4b0c5d50b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| _**ICYMI: HR 1 Is Attempted ‘Hostile Takeover’ of Elections**_
Hoosier Republicans,

This morning, Fox News published a story about the Democrats’ attempted federal hijacking of our elections. You can read the entire piece here:
[\--> Click here to read the entire Fox News piece <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=332cb36b8a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
This attempted abuse of power will have long term consequences for, not just Indiana, but for our entire country.

The Fox News story comes, in part, from a larger piece I wrote highlighting the danger HR 1 is to our republic. Below is the full text of that piece

Please help us spread the word about this attempted Democrat takeover of our elections so we can stop it in its tracks.

**Hupfer: Democrat HR 1 is Attempted ‘Hostile Takeover’ of Elections**

It didn’t take long—and we knew it wouldn’t—for Nancy Pelosi to use her razor-thin House majority to ram through a horde of items on her leftwing wish list. We’ve already seen this on taxes, energy independence (notice those rising gas prices?), and border security. However, perhaps the Pelosi-led Democrats’ most egregious overreach is HR 1, the Orwellian titled “For the People Act.” HR 1 is nothing short of a hostile takeover by Democrats to federalize our state and local elections. All Americans should be alarmed by this power grab.

If enacted, HR 1 would allow Democrats to hijack our election system. Pelosi, Schumer, and the rest of the Democrats are using their temporary control in Washington to force through a wholesale takeover of state election laws that will open opportunities for widespread fraud and corruption. In fact, the Democrats are so obsessed with this power grab, that they are plotting to eliminate the senate filibuster and ram HR1 through. (By the way, if you want to see hypocrisy at its finest, watch the videos of former Senators Biden and Obama and Senators Schumer and Durbin, among many others, passionately defending the importance of the senate filibuster when Democrats were in the minority).

HR 1 would completely eviscerate state voter ID laws, such as the one we have in Indiana that has been upheld by the Supreme Court. Voter ID is not only legal, but also widely popular and helps insure one person, one vote. Showing an ID to cast your vote is no more of a burden than showing an ID to do any number of things, from starting a new job to opening a checking account to picking up tickets at the will-call window at a Major League Baseball game.

This proposal would force 37 states to adopt automatic voter registration and would force 27 states to adopt same day voter registration with no safeguards or support for verification. And, while Democrats are stuffing the voter rolls with unverified registrations, HR 1 makes it nearly impossible to purge state voter rolls of ineligible voters.

HR 1 would give felons the right to vote. It would force you to pay for political campaigns by giving candidates your tax dollars. It limits free speech. It would count illegal aliens as residents, which would impact how congressional districts are drawn, giving more seats to traditionally Democrat areas. Maybe this explains why President Biden has allowed a complete breakdown of our southern border, doing nothing as waves and waves of illegal immigrants pour through the border and overwhelm our law enforcement officers and facilities.

The proposal would also expand flawed and insecure vote-by-mail systems where ballots are mailed to voters regardless of if a ballot is requested or not. This was a system Democrats pushed during the 2020 election. This bill weaponizes the Federal Elections Commission and encourages the practice of ballot harvesting, a method of collecting ballots by partisan organizations.

This legislation is the stuff of banana republics and is so far outside the mainstream that so-called moderate Democrats should join Republicans in rejecting this bill. If the Democrats get their wish and this bill is enacted, it will limit political expression, make our elections less secure, and line the ledger sheets of Democrat campaigns with taxpayer money.

I’ve long believed that Washington needs more Indiana, Indiana doesn’t need more Washington. I’m sure red states and blue states alike feel the same about their home states. Indiana knows how to run elections for Indiana. As does Ohio for Ohio, Utah for Utah, New York for New York, and so on throughout the nation. In my home state, we’ve become nationally known as having the most reliable and rock-solid elections in the country. Hoosiers trust our system and we don’t need—or want—Washington Democrats to take it over.

Election integrity is one of the most critical issues we face as a country. Americans must have confidence in our elections. Republicans will always fight against the Democrats’ assault on the security and integrity of our elections. Democrat-proposed HR 1 will make our elections less secure. HR1 is a bad bill, and it would be a bad law. I encourage all to reject it.
---
|
---
---

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Packing the Court Is Dangerous 🧑‍⚖️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c194bdbe66774efd819609ef57e751d9&_e=ME996_D4JRvtcwlinF-TmcvgcOcbfMKFHI4wDG88Q9Bts8l5l0KAMFQgX8r_tqsKVxnFkpJDjkSnGsWbmY9MsXdxbxMR-01AE5M-ar3Zfc8WxdPGYZAfo7zYcVm-LhZAsrGeP5SNPGVXq4IXWcl3TlXS5qhDHKlKOMQqSo69ObCOYZVuOEfk0B1jOfUvtJi60GNvzQoEyG4NVo5DXUAKgU_W7Jjj8EAKqG_3ByRJYdd7BNoI2lv8tTsvTnCF4DEgT6wY6Zgz5nfIhVXQDv0HbmubYLT_bY3Mw8ovPsgDSKA%3D) **Packing the Court Is Dangerous 🧑⚖️****
** Just when you thought it couldn’t get worse, the Democrats pushed another extreme idea. This time, it’s so radical, even Nancy Pelosi and Bernie Sanders are not on board. House Democrats [introduced](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c194bdbe66774efd819609ef57e751d9&_e=ME996_D4JRvtcwlinF-TmTFeCwyy1GzKtXfenQohei93eJjN37Tv7QAYZAZ5FuMYv0By8J-el3BsV7aXmHf6SpMAgJyhXzL23xFPoTQeJB_N3pcpkp_IQuNX3xv4cIkIRQbo1uzh-mGhBkcZGvcwF1jj1GrsDBmVV2A74L39-9BkdTR202I0dsDIlqpQ5xhGtWeb5TOEFs4h-xJ2HtDEour6aajg2YW3ceG6lvpShG0uIbdg2Y8hFoe-q4Xk8BCLSjyc3BD2Z_1uHQTRadh4B7TBmTDEiau2PAhZYrm2sX4MQg6wlbwxmOBxNHR50h7f2SXrwk-Fofc5KdieYuDlS7hDbjoI9GmW5AwoDmwsItts6VheaE5KOA3NIdLaGq9j) legislation to pack the Supreme Court with four additional justices. The move would bring the total number of justices to 13 and instantly give Democrats a liberal majority on the nation’s highest court. If Democrats get their way, they will nominate justices who will rubber stamp their liberal agenda on abortion, guns, education, government control, and many other critical issues. Even worse, packing the Supreme Court is a political power grab that will weaken the court, diminish the rule of law, and threaten our democracy. It’s such a dangerous idea that even Joe Biden [called](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c194bdbe66774efd819609ef57e751d9&_e=ME996_D4JRvtcwlinF-TmQfKevgksFaHVofKUFkk7d1ASyf3dG_ySpZGIGfV-yxx9Brdr7FiAcE4MIkWO7DhCh1TUEhfAqe3tfzEqjbBMo0k2sBdlHRy-u_oonilaHDWMJQyOtU2ec3KRosfTgNTdbWjhmTLhFTtB3tqKHLcBmD6Le3WVShpl9u-s1Bk_fhbS6Aox7oOinjD7NsyabcW-o5OTXUq_VDks7-imoNnabY4hIOxzVY48dSiuo4Vtcs7YIOodtLyDkgs3_ErpoQNp8KZPpvzWzBs3MKCHgLpzP79tSdUaYhBHDjvGZNI_XeOhZic6OZTPdamDwdzlIFCtWoVokLReSMb9wxraJboieNRcvFbYS4NmmsbmEomjaUqj3focU7PaWmlNr0XuLwU0EryD634Xn37ePwYQKDKDwd07zjpKZy8mhASgLaqoGcc) it a “bonehead idea” once upon a time. Maybe Biden should listen to his own advice and stand up to the liberal extremists in his party. | |

This week I reintroduced the [Master Sergeant Roddie Edmonds](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c194bdbe66774efd819609ef57e751d9&_e=ME996_D4JRvtcwlinF-TmXD0JX2DklzyPLmAqCJQahV3kpC1wVcqSrebuSzMZlt73OAVQOe7aSGXCK7P-dtK5M-gvYs-yBSNYJR_DGXv3_gLx8XTgl5KPR5V5vfkK3fjFughPxFpyGgi53ObR4UZBLbzJepR1KKYPEq_nOehNb__i4lptw6YRz-BLPAC7LdZdLjw_oS06yFnFHS7wmnArYtXW533xSXyxFjS_oDphyaHLk57NCe8R82GZvdQT0XkzeCWbCLTyd_ceWJgpxFAN91CyYSe9XVzcsyTKVKDpd1h2AzsI6rFzsk0tdJv6nyy) Congressional Gold Medal Act to award a Congressional Gold Medal to a Knoxville, Tennessee hero. Edmonds served in the US Army during World War II and was taken prisoner by the Germans.

He was placed in charge of his fellow prisoners and instructed to single out all the Jewish POWs—who would likely be sent to extermination camps. Instead, Edmonds instructed all the POWs—Jews and non-Jews alike—to stand together. When the German officer confronted him, saying, “They cannot all be Jews,” Edmonds did not waver. “We are all Jews,” he said.

This incredible hero deserves to be recognized.

**Just For Fun 🐻**
_Photo courtesy of Fox News_

It’s not usually considered the most formal place to dine, but this Long Island McDonald’s may change your mind. The 19th century mansion—with hardwood floors, a double staircase, and the original portico—was recently dubbed the "[most beautiful" McDonald’s in the U.S](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c194bdbe66774efd819609ef57e751d9&_e=ME996_D4JRvtcwlinF-TmXsNOeE21cZydOJroM8gbwfwkhFBU9Wy1niGbcRmqTuGqewo-roipwMs3TI8yaCkCqwENpstBnDMWqcojklO7GIzb-7wVTT5G8-0gQVAPndFkFAaWEiKy42GmMS1bj_3GAYlaf2nVFSnY8TlvtiulTZzvRmqbp-OC_ANasrcw43hL6cpEAuDXT6jvWB0E5u0_0iD68LadIyu2Ohvu34GMIqJ4lf-esJvt9kxrlEhrBthQP1l4sC2YYuo6OmZsTZLcPVY_yeCF9WEgrvykojFzhtE8J9UZk4Pf_-yYu5z-mMH4qDCWLrGPwuHkDyk44mLyJOnYUMtFbSygBUQQdi0sRJnj6cu_pkxdzbn7zf0-fa-).

In 1986, McDonald’s bought the rundown property and planned to tear it down, but residents objected. McDonald’s eventually agreed to restore the building—in exchange for permission to build a drive-thru. The McMansion finally opened in 1991, looking much the same as it did in the 1920s. Turns out, residents can have their Big Mac and eat it too.

body:

Friend, I know exactly how Georgians are feeling right now.
These angry liberals attempted to "cancel" me, too!
Folks in the media have said I should never be able to work again because I had the audacity to hold a different political opinion than they do!
And this happens all of the time now.
The far-left attempts to cancel anyone who speaks out to praise America, President Trump, or fights to preserve our fundamental freedoms like our right to vote.
But let me tell you, Friend, I will not be backed into a corner or silenced by the radical left. And I think it's so important we stand together and speak up!
**It's time to get real and #CancelCancelCulture.**
**If you agree, please chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2219745/](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=8fee162ac5d742e6b01505982aebaa40&_e=Hbn7Oq1oKnw1XD8MgM8OUQuiLd5aUNSy8_01pBLG2jqRF9VAGFrEAULnAuDzDb5rFJ0ZnQtzz3NSJee9ZiV_ltOpCah-D-8npkY_5J0Wo5jVbzflolgVlIrJgbEOEhwtSuNb0o2kEdnT3b7lSxCIQif0r1bdNM0jbx3Y6XeiOVI-wf8yOYU6gRzzKx4lc8JcnK-7t1m0hqS0-BCXFOmwjCeaah3OmNq7Pu37EPKTqO3kSruERzoBTjLIe9EK9lF5veR_QAPfkEOBvc1I3gwyaTyqUUllIuiyRrDi1CLncyL8pVxc_Dys0lFN5fF_JlAR-3GgS9zjNnnukqQrE8qSKNpsOSFn0yXpy7wnZqnnnaZCcDU7LxdiZxoo8Oc5ptqu)**
_If the leftists had their way, we’d all be censored and silent, but I know socialist “solutions” and an out-of-control cancel culture will not heal America – it will only further divide and destroy us. _
Everything we love about America at stake – and with the radical left now in control of Washington – our governors become the last line of defense. They'll be on the frontlines of the next big battles we face for free speech.
**That is why I’m running for Governor of Arkansas. To fight this fight for our freedom.**
I know I am the right person for the job, and I hope I have your support.
My dad always said the real test of a leader is not the way you handle the issues you know are coming - it’s rising to the moment in a crisis you can never plan for.
I can say confidently, I learned that lesson while I served President Trump in the White House.
I was there at the table with President Trump confronting our most dangerous adversaries like China and North Korea. When we fought and won big fights on tax cuts, securing the border, and conservative judges.
We endured relentless threats and attacks through it all.
In fact, I was the first White House press secretary to require Secret Service protection because of a credible violent threat against me!
But we never lost focus on the most important thing: getting the job done.
That’s exactly what we need to do in every state right now, and I plan to do it in Arkansas!
Please, chip in now to support my effort to CANCEL cancel culture and serve the people of Arkansas. Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.

Corporate contributions are not permissible.

Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.

| | Dear Peter --

We need to end mass incarceration.

The way to do that is to elect District Attorneys who are committed to transformation.

Manhattan has a chance to elect an extraordinary new District Attorney, a man who has dedicated his life to civil rights, has prosecuted law enforcement and white collar criminals, and has sued the Trump Foundation and won. His vision of justice, implemented, will have national implications for criminal justice.

**His name is Alvin Bragg, the former Chief Deputy Attorney General in New York State.**

[_**He is running against a billionaire candidate backed by $30,000 checks, so I hope you will join me today by sending a $5, $10, or $20 grassroots donation to his campaign. **_](https://alvinbragg.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7bb0a7f5d2e3f8989cf70e7ba&id=a20519f67a&e=22f9b9906b)

| Prosecutors have traditionally lauded what they call "tough-on-crime" policies which have disproportionately impacted Black and brown communities in New York City.

Alvin Bragg has a plan to change these practices. Alvin has the personal lived experience and the track record that make him uniquely suited to take on this massive challenge

**I support Alvin because he will be a transformational District Attorney.** He also has an impressive history of taking on corrupt politicians and powerful white collar criminals. He has proven he won't back down to Wall Street money or be influenced by fancy connections.

[_**Alvin’s doesn't take any money from corporations or defense attorneys that have or may have cases before the Manhattan District Attorney, and so that means this campaign depends on grassroots donations from individuals like you. body:
Radical liberals like Mazie Hirono are at least honest about wanting to punish President Trump for his years of taking China to task. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d031c6d76b7b42139e656642762def65&_e=dAv3FdA29py4Gwdca4k3UbmG1ZT3uIDklrRb_cRJUgQDLOTemiOYm3_eiH5N0BP5kdGwrhWB3BEOf0xwd4IrUCWmib4vYr2AUPpkFwZX9HklsYYpOGXPg9D0YJfoKq8MLlL0WinGcxA3CzJRFEbMt9sfcJVD7gnJ3_JGtMcFGejyaeY_3pJGLyK_z3y8i5ji947Xm6jM9tGzL0TH-KlMjOW_7BSF-ykAZ8FhPbSXHmNRIU9PMzoVc58_bgUx3oEBr8Kxw34ihnIOguMkjZXo0S7DETQ0yrmMUAN1P0r0niEgdKWxJ4j2AWu5LrwEc-WjjlKi6G0k0qeItXehflAfRJTwAqAzC0eO1cWetJFg2tnXIF2fhuOPnpO8n0PKS45T_AfCruuToHIRF42KoBHCJw%3D%3D) | |

Peter,
Trump is out of office, but liberals are still going after him.

Radical liberals like Mazie Hirono are at least honest about wanting to punish President Trump for his years of taking China to task.

Since the beginning of the pandemic, Chinese Communist Party propaganda has worked round-the-clock to shirk responsibility for the spread of the Coronavirus.

Liberals want to criminalize saying things like “Wuhan virus” — music to the ears of Communist China.
[_**I AGREE: FREE SPEECH > COMMUNIST CHINA**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d031c6d76b7b42139e656642762def65&_e=dAv3FdA29py4Gwdca4k3UbmG1ZT3uIDklrRb_cRJUgQDLOTemiOYm3_eiH5N0BP5wPljq6KbMGCHHCsGXn_YoQierF2M8rJrsJaCUryWHRoMNcXkX6SvEe3-1xoZWeV8GddP-SsBezB5_mRECH_9HVqAN2Z4xGP4dQGf-tmaN2Lp8SIPWjo7fL1hiWf9oq0AxbmhalX9cD0L23a4BooYvCm5-b3gqxR-ZGmxBScdIXZvwqXZXuWs5gJNvvYsdZyEdp__FrU4c-jxTVW2wOPd9NExzCOpN6xl-XTiPpxWFVQz42Yz5eDr6sOYC4FJ06fNXmYbyIO9q2CimMQEQrgxXq1TGX63o7gwXUqnJej6vdrSBsOzau2eQ762ZcMA_zMHM2Zext-L4xVs061sVd98Jg%3D%3D)

The federal government should not be in the business of policing free speech; deciding what speech is offensive, then monitoring it.

I’d rather side with free speech at the expense of offending Communist China.

Calling out CCP propaganda may not be popular in Washington, but I take my orders from Missouri, not China.
We're in this together,
Josh

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Identification is racist?
body:
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76d3bdf55901479a8c9d0d31e9117035&_e=bXzdmLNlTqKwd55L6eyJr3iHp8j3h6cp-GxHMVIsbID0A7xIoNjKe6gxhGPVo8H6r0-Kji-YqBCu2HnEJOULCsfYyVxlf_4m7UPEpubgKmtKn9_F2RLLhoE845YAd2o9pz7QoU18inms2gtCw2vZA3UFQYEU7KTLbS67hvZXRrj32pVG7xDl-NWSN4zl2x_NfenJBWFbLdBQcxX---u8Dkqy0Z5cOH6DS9eHX-wirYh5AqemYDS4QIhD3B8hnQgB2dGblb6G0A1vElfei6kiLaS2DMqbd2FZEjV2tF37GSHpIZt_25c6GKLxdpSO2qciDN_IObpCmyZvlCLeHeGaiPMcBtF0m74c_u1R-bd5eWi-JoPktY6fF-f2ZYNgMRy3VMpRw082GOEmkZEtxkvf3IJmoirkoOrxaNlMSm2PB6Q%3D) Dear Fellow Conservative,
You need an ID to drive, fly on a plane, and so much more. There’s no reason that an eligible adult should be without an ID.
Yet, the Left claims that requiring identification for voting is racist and will disenfranchise voters—especially minority voters.
**I need your help today to counter this.**
As Governor of South Carolina, I was vilified when we passed voter ID legislation in 2011.
Yet, the claim that voter ID is unfair to minorities is not true.
It is time for liberals to stop acting like minorities are ignorant.
We are not ignorant. We are perfectly capable of getting a photo ID.
We want to know that our vote counts and that there is integrity in our elections.
Voter ID is one of the simplest ways to secure our elections.
**[That is why I am hoping you will make a one-time donation of $35 or more to Stand For America right now.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76d3bdf55901479a8c9d0d31e9117035&_e=bXzdmLNlTqKwd55L6eyJr3iHp8j3h6cp-GxHMVIsbID0A7xIoNjKe6gxhGPVo8H6r0-Kji-YqBCu2HnEJOULCsfYyVxlf_4m7UPEpubgKmtKn9_F2RLLhoE845YAd2o9pz7QoU18inms2gtCw2vZA3UFQYEU7KTLbS67hvZXRrj32pVG7xDl-NWSN4zl2x_NfenJBWFbLdBQcxX---u8Dt2yBAH55LKW8MUTpGoOHvAOQh5y34j6x5BXDbr6hIkfRSpB902UrhifbRiJ5kHcSg2jMoimrKs2YJ6UjTeLbF1b3KAUuQ-Nv4SQPSIiaTq4B-7Wf8GVwCdIR5HyX0af8lhelWQaBK-eR0Oyzp8TdFCfQVd6Gu60Kr-A2iRpoI_uTIpJDHTdDnAMo5ugLjm6Zr42JjvrglSJvi1rke1BQXI%3D)**
By rushing your gift today, you ensure that Stand For America has the resources on hand to continue our powerful grassroots movement.
We must support voter ID legislation in every state.
It doesn’t matter if you live in Washington or Wyoming, South Carolina or South Dakota.
**Your vote should count. **
Georgia just passed a law that improves the integrity of elections by ensuring that votes are counted and that you have validation.
Yet liberals and big corporations still think minorities are incapable of getting something as simple as a photo ID.
We have to quit treating minorities like they’re stupid – because we are not.
**[Stand with your fellow conservatives and help us defend fair elections with a generous one-time contribution of $35.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76d3bdf55901479a8c9d0d31e9117035&_e=bXzdmLNlTqKwd55L6eyJr3iHp8j3h6cp-GxHMVIsbID0A7xIoNjKe6gxhGPVo8H6r0-Kji-YqBCu2HnEJOULCsfYyVxlf_4m7UPEpubgKmtKn9_F2RLLhoE845YAd2o9pz7QoU18inms2gtCw2vZA3UFQYEU7KTLbS67hvZXRrj32pVG7xDl-NWSN4zl2x_NfenJBWFbLdBQcxX---u8DqCtcEzytTEHUCYZTIlNrz06M-RZeEeKAuS-6BEpswerbj-k_xSY5tz1GvbADbOn0lCssJpNOHJqOhqeKf0TuXMnjgJjcI7H1qS6B4yTy0eQWNIFHNiUGK207HxLKt87CDmSvyJeazxQaN7F_pDYlxZhcNGzRIW7KTJumzYu50T-ws0uRPDriZXQvZWTfxF_yPPhi4TVkY7Y_DVLhbTbQG0%3D)**
Do you know what I did when the Left claimed we were disenfranchising voters because they couldn’t get a photo ID?
I said we would pick up anyone who needs an ID, take them to the DMV, and return them home.
Out of 5 million people, do you know the number of people who asked for help? **25.**
And by adding voter ID, the number of voters in South Carolina went up.
**That is exactly why I continue to support voter ID laws nationwide. **
**[I hope you will donate $35, $50, or even $100 right now.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=76d3bdf55901479a8c9d0d31e9117035&_e=bXzdmLNlTqKwd55L6eyJr3iHp8j3h6cp-GxHMVIsbID0A7xIoNjKe6gxhGPVo8H6r0-Kji-YqBCu2HnEJOULCsfYyVxlf_4m7UPEpubgKmtKn9_F2RLLhoE845YAd2o9pz7QoU18inms2gtCw2vZA3UFQYEU7KTLbS67hvZXRrj32pVG7xDl-NWSN4zl2x_NfenJBWFbLdBQcxX---u8DqxE-CLQk475kIaUSoKPICacpLjcyA0Hr5uO-uGBRucZ5VUzE4tOYWIPK6v3Wkyw954zBk5qWA8dGa150LyHzZONeFZSDjivJsWoxyLwWAKeJOKZkCgqyqo_EplWwlWvvmr6sunkbm1u4wW7btIdOsf1G00f0JpzDem2h1zus3KlE3c1uog9yvxywsfGsUe2mtPN-xfcFkFnCb0XKKkthsA%3D)**
Supporting and passing voter ID laws is vital to ensuring that our elections are fair, free, and legitimate.
Thank you for standing with me today, and most importantly thank you for standing for America.

clean_body: Dear Fellow Conservative, You need an ID to drive, fly on a plane, and so much more. There’s no reason that an eligible adult should be without an ID. Yet, the Left claims that requiring identification for voting is racist and will disenfranchise voters—especially minority voters. I need your help today to counter this. As Governor of South Carolina, I was vilified when we passed voter ID legislation in 2011. Yet, the claim that voter ID is unfair to minorities is not true. It is time for liberals to stop acting like minorities are ignorant. We are not ignorant. We are perfectly capable of getting a photo ID. We want to know that our vote counts and that there is integrity in our elections. Voter ID is one of the simplest ways to secure our elections. By rushing your gift today, you ensure that Stand For America has the resources on hand to continue our powerful grassroots movement. We must support voter ID legislation in every state. It doesn’t matter if you live in Washington or Wyoming, South Carolina or South Dakota. Your vote should count. Georgia just passed a law that improves the integrity of elections by ensuring that votes are counted and that you have validation. Yet liberals and big corporations still think minorities are incapable of getting something as simple as a photo ID. We have to quit treating minorities like they’re stupid – because we are not. Do you know what I did when the Left claimed we were disenfranchising voters because they couldn’t get a photo ID? I said we would pick up anyone who needs an ID, take them to the DMV, and return them home. Out of 5 million people, do you know the number of people who asked for help? 25. And by adding voter ID, the number of voters in South Carolina went up. That is exactly why I continue to support voter ID laws nationwide. Supporting and passing voter ID laws is vital to ensuring that our elections are fair, free, and legitimate. Thank you for standing with me today, and most importantly thank you for standing for America. My very best, Nikki R. Haley Founded by Ambassador Nikki Haley, Stand For America is an advocacy group promoting public policies that strengthen America’s economy, culture, and national security. | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- © Stand For America | 611 Pennsylvania Ave, SE #145 Washington, DC 20003-4303 Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

clean_body: They’re preparing to target Wisconsin. | Friend, Now that the Wisconsin’s governor’s race has been called a TOSS-UP, national Democrats are preparing to spend MILLIONS to try and keep Tony Evers in power. Evers will call up his partner in crime, Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer, who is now Vice Chair of the DNC to direct emergency funding to his campaign. That’s why I’ll need the help of grassroots conservatives like YOU to stop the influx of swamp money into Wisconsin. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Sent: Mon, Apr 19, 2021 Subject: New Status: TOSS-UP To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I have exciting news for you. The Governor’s race in Wisconsin has been declared a TOSS-UP in a new polling report. From Kenosha burning to the unemployment insurance debacle to a botched vaccine rollout, voters are fed up with Tony Evers’ failures and are starved for real leadership. After 30 of our supported conservative candidates won their races in Wisconsin, I believe we can turn the governor’s race from a toss-up to a Republican victory. But as always, victory will depend on grassroots leaders like you. I know how critical of a role you played when you fought by my side during my past campaigns. That’s why I’m turning to you again as we turn our eyes to the Governor’s Mansion to deliver a Republican victory next year. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

Note from Chairman Stepanek
**Derek,**

**It’s alarming to see Kamala Harris visiting our state in the midst of the largest migrant surge we’ve seen in 20 years. This worsening crisis was the direct result of decisions made by Biden and Harris. Harris was put in charge of overseeing and solving this crisis yet she hasn’t traveled to the border to solve this crisis. Going in the exact opposite direction. This should concern all Americans who have seen no actions taken whatsoever in regards to our southern border. **

**This past week, I had the opportunity to speak with Republican National Committee Members from across the country regarding the Biden administration’s sluggish response to the crisis facing the American people. Over 50% of citizens disapprove of the administration's handling of this crisis and Granite Staters will agree in conveying that sentiment. We were joined at lunch yesterday by Texas Governor Greg Abbot, who talked in detail about the lengths the State of Texas has had to take to supplement the failed Federal response to our Southern Border Crisis. This is a deep concern amongst Republican leaders, which is why so many of them are visiting the border themselves to gauge the problem. Instead of neglecting the most important issue on her agenda, Kamala Harris should take the lead to tackle this devastating crisis. While at the RNC Meeting in Dallas, New Hampshire joined forces with the Iowa, South Carolina, and Nevada Republican Committees to host a hospitality hour. This event went to great lengths to promote our First-in-the-Nation Primary and the 4 carve out states in our Republican nominating calendar displayed unity at the national level. **

**We’re lucky that here in New Hampshire, our state has had the benefit of strong leadership under Governor Chris Sununu. Unlike our Federal delegation, Governor Sununu has worked tirelessly to the benefit of Granite Staters, and the proof of this lies in the data. A recent UNH poll showed that over two-thirds of New Hampshire residents approve of Governor Sununu’s work navigating the pandemic, with a 93% approval rating amongst Republicans and 74% amongst Independents. Strong leadership here in N.H, has led to the state being ranked number one for weeks in terms of administering the highest percentage of delivered vaccines. Our Federal administration should take note of successful state leadership, and apply these same common-sense skills towards national issues before states are forced to suffer the consequences of their weak leadership.**
** **

**As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to info@nhgop.org!**

**Sincerely,**
**Stephen Stepanek**
**NHGOP Chairman**

**_Republican Spotlight: Lili Walsh _**
In this week’s republican spotlight, we are highlighting Lilli Walsh. Lilli Walsh has been an incredible asset since she started assisting in N.H politics. In her time with us, she has volunteered a great deal time for events as well as even hosting some events in her own home.

She was heavily involved in the 2020 election cycle, and we appreciate her dedication to supporting conservative leadership in N.H. She also holds two leadership positions. She is the Rockingham County Republican Committee Area 2 chair, and the Hampstead/Kingston GOP chair, along with being involved with the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women.

We would like to say thank you for all the work that Lilli Walsh has put in to make the republican party strong in New Hampshire.
We are excited to see what the future holds for her in NH politics. Again, thank you for all your hard work and dedication to the republican leadership in NH!

NH Republican House Update:
**_This upcoming week, our House Criminal Justice Committee will be taking steps to protect your Second Amendment Rights._**

Wednesday at 9 AM, **SB141-FN **will refine the procedure which the state uses for background checks for firearms. [You can learn more about the bill by clicking here. ](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=9rxJ2isEPYc9Jk5GRLjPZFaCHbUdXhMp63f6PpNJTk4YlLbcJy7LUbBEmtm9vqZtFawkg5PcHj4-2FaipOzb4EBE-2FzpXz-2FIqu6YA7dR5swUj-2Bg1iSSc23UnU9VqmQwFF79rEJhE8FfqK1HsuWg4rCWzg-3D-3DMjzq_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95Hzzj6ZeJ9Jy5qL3eE6jNKWFY86Y0xUTrnPb4g-2FZCq2KyMGDL3p7GrRsUkdZHxeb7U6ngCtif35D7V8rtv2cjUzO26cOxJ6JHLstHv8vG9vF8KmTAPPU9tTCAQftgRkRBPl9QjrvUIE-2BMbM5RDMZGgNT7vx2odsgT2o-2BvXE-2B-2BfKAYFcfd4iFiXgeCNoYNmIqmSqG3yVGGj1pLTZrks5iutYVqrNppi0uik2WfGTOzyIyKsGJe2s4-2FLBm9zr2dJXTGTmg2uh76QTQ4J1QvZAznnAg-3D-3D)

Upcoming Events Republican Spotlight: Rockingham Republican Committee of Area 2 Chair & Hampstead/Kingston GOP Chair, Lili Walsh House Republican Update NHFRW Update NHGOP Tweets | Note from Chairman Stepanek Derek, It’s alarming to see Kamala Harris visiting our state in the midst of the largest migrant surge we’ve seen in 20 years. This worsening crisis was the direct result of decisions made by Biden and Harris. Harris was put in charge of overseeing and solving this crisis yet she hasn’t traveled to the border to solve this crisis. Going in the exact opposite direction. This should concern all Americans who have seen no actions taken whatsoever in regards to our southern border. This past week, I had the opportunity to speak with Republican National Committee Members from across the country regarding the Biden administration’s sluggish response to the crisis facing the American people. Over 50% of citizens disapprove of the administration's handling of this crisis and Granite Staters will agree in conveying that sentiment. We were joined at lunch yesterday by Texas Governor Greg Abbot, who talked in detail about the lengths the State of Texas has had to take to supplement the failed Federal response to our Southern Border Crisis. This is a deep concern amongst Republican leaders, which is why so many of them are visiting the border themselves to gauge the problem. Instead of neglecting the most important issue on her agenda, Kamala Harris should take the lead to tackle this devastating crisis. While at the RNC Meeting in Dallas, New Hampshire joined forces with the Iowa, South Carolina, and Nevada Republican Committees to host a hospitality hour. This event went to great lengths to promote our First-in-the-Nation Primary and the 4 carve out states in our Republican nominating calendar displayed unity at the national level. We’re lucky that here in New Hampshire, our state has had the benefit of strong leadership under Governor Chris Sununu. Unlike our Federal delegation, Governor Sununu has worked tirelessly to the benefit of Granite Staters, and the proof of this lies in the data. A recent UNH poll showed that over two-thirds of New Hampshire residents approve of Governor Sununu’s work navigating the pandemic, with a 93% approval rating amongst Republicans and 74% amongst Independents. Strong leadership here in N.H, has led to the state being ranked number one for weeks in terms of administering the highest percentage of delivered vaccines. Our Federal administration should take note of successful state leadership, and apply these same common-sense skills towards national issues before states are forced to suffer the consequences of their weak leadership. As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to info@nhgop.org! Sincerely, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | | Weekly Governor's Glance: To learn more about the Governor's efforts, click the link to his website below | | | Judicial Alert! Breaking News: President Biden will create a panel to study expanding the Supreme Court in an effort to balance the conservative majority created by Donald Trump. -- The New York Times (@nytimes) | Follow our State House Accounts: | | Upcoming Events | | May 6th (6pm) NHGOP Reception Featuring Corey Lewandowski July 17th (10am-3pm) Hillsborough County Machine Gun Shoot | Republican Spotlight: Lili Walsh In this week’s republican spotlight, we are highlighting Lilli Walsh. Lilli Walsh has been an incredible asset since she started assisting in N.H politics. In her time with us, she has volunteered a great deal time for events as well as even hosting some events in her own home. She was heavily involved in the 2020 election cycle, and we appreciate her dedication to supporting conservative leadership in N.H. She also holds two leadership positions. She is the Rockingham County Republican Committee Area 2 chair, and the Hampstead/Kingston GOP chair, along with being involved with the New Hampshire Federation of Republican Women. We would like to say thank you for all the work that Lilli Walsh has put in to make the republican party strong in New Hampshire. We are excited to see what the future holds for her in NH politics. Again, thank you for all your hard work and dedication to the republican leadership in NH! NH Republican House Update: This upcoming week, our House Criminal Justice Committee will be taking steps to protect your Second Amendment Rights. Wednesday at 9 AM, SB141-FN will refine the procedure which the state uses for background checks for firearms. At 11:30 AM on Wednesday, the committee will hear SB154 prohibiting the state from enforcing Presidential Executive Orders that regulates your rights to keep and bear arms. We will also have our House Ways and Means Committee hear SB3 at 10:00, which will clarify the taxes that are put on federal Paycheck Protection Program loans.
